sessionLimit.title: Session limit pahunch gayi
sessionLimit.intro: Aap active session ki maximum sankhya par pahunch gaye hain. Samapt karne aur sign in karne ke liye ek device chunein:
sessionLimit.tooltipText: Mujhe yeh kyun dikh raha hai?
sessionLimit.tooltipBody: Aapka account aapke current plan dwara anumat maximum devices par sign in hai. Yahan sign in karne ke liye, niche diye gaye kisi ek chalu session ko samapt karein - woh device sign out ho jayega, aur yeh device uski jagah le lega. Yeh limit aapke account ko unauthorized access se surakshit rakhti hai.
sessionLimit.terminateButton: Samapt karein aur sign in karein

errors.googleSignInFailed: Google sign-in viphal raha. Kripya dobara koshish karein.

codes.OTP_RATE_LIMITED: Bahut baar code manga hai. Thodi der ruk kar dobara koshish karein.
codes.OTP_LOCKED: Bahut baar galat code daala hai. Password use karein ya thodi der baad koshish karein.
codes.OTP_INCORRECT: Galat ya expire ho chuka code. Dobara koshish karein.
codes.OTP_EXPIRED: Yeh code expire ho gaya hai. Naya code mangwaayein.
codes.INVITE_EXPIRED: Yeh invite expire ho gaya hai. Workspace owner se naya mangwaayein.
codes.INVITE_IDENTIFIER_MISMATCH: Yeh invite kisi aur email ya mobile number par bheja gaya tha.
codes.SESSION_LIMIT_REACHED: Aap adhiktam devices par sign in hain. Aage badhne ke liye ek device se sign out karein.
codes.PIN_LOCKOUT_FORGOT_REQUIRED: Bahut baar galat PIN daala hai. Aage badhne ke liye PIN reset karein.
codes.FORGOT_RESET_CLAIM_REQUIRED: Yeh password reset link ab valid nahi hai. Forgot-password prakriya dobara shuru karein.
codes.NETWORK_UNREACHABLE: Server se connect nahi ho paaya. Apna internet connection check karke dobara koshish karein.
codes.ACCOUNT_SCHEDULED_FOR_DELETION: Yeh account delete hone ke liye scheduled hai. Permanent roop se hatne se pehle ise recover karne ke liye humse sampark karein.
codes.fallback: Kuch galat ho gaya. Dobara koshish karein.

pendingInviteThisWs.body: {date} ko expire hoga. Dubara bhejna ya cancel karne ke liye invitations page kholen.

registered.title: Yeh number manekhr par pehle se registered hai
registered.body: Employee ko ek OTP bhej kar pakka karein ki yeh number sach mein unka hi hai. Galti se galat aadmi ko add karne se rokta hai. Baad mein access dete waqt verify karna ho to chhod sakte hain.
registered.verifiedTitle: Mobile verify ho gaya. Ab is vyakti ko jodne ke liye taiyar.
registered.skipped: Filhal chhod diya. Save karne ke baad, member ki profile par Verify mobile button dikhega taki aap baad mein number verify kar sakein.

mobileOtpModal.unavailable: Phone verification activate ki ja rahi hai aur abhi uplabdh nahi hai. Aap abhi member add kar sakte hain aur unka number baad mein verify kar sakte hain.
mobileOtpModal.title: Mobile number verify karein
mobileOtpModal.subtitle: Hamne {mobile} par 6 ank ka code bheja hai. Employee se padhwa kar yahan likhein.

errors.wrongCode: Code match nahi hua. {remaining} prayatn baaki.
errors.expired: Code expire ho gaya. Resend dabaayein.
errors.rateLimited: Bahut sari requests. Ek minute ruk kar dubara prayatn karein.
errors.smsFailed: SMS bhej nahi sake. Number jaanchein ya dubara prayatn karein.

mobileOtpModal.success: Mobile verify ho gaya. Member jodna jaari rakhein.

mobileBadge.unverifiedTooltip: Mobile abhi verify nahi hua. Ek OTP bhej kar pakka karne ke liye click karein ki yeh number employee ka hi hai.

team.deactivateDesc: Yeh member inactive mark ho jayega lekin unka saara data surakshit rahega. Aap unhe kabhi bhi reactivate kar sakte hain.
team.deactivateWarning: Deactivate karne par kya hota hai?
team.deactivatePoint1: Member active hajiri/salary calculation me nahi dikhega
team.deactivatePoint2: Saara historical data (salary, hajiri) surakshit rahega
team.deactivatePoint3: Member ki app access (agar di gayi ho) suspend ho jayegi
team.deactivateInfoDesc: Yeh member ke user account par asar nahi karta. Agar unke paas login credentials hain, to ve dusre workspace jahan ve active hain wahan abhi bhi access kar sakte hain.
team.archiveDesc: Ye member archived tab me chala jayega. Aap unhe kabhi bhi restore kar sakte hain. Salary aur hajiri ka history intact rehta hai. Saara data hatane ke liye archived view se 'Hamesha ke liye delete karein' use karein.
team.archiveWarning: Archive karne par kya hota hai?
team.archivePoint1: Member active list se chhupa hua hai
team.archivePoint2: Salary aur hajiri ka itihaas surakshit rakha jata hai
team.archivePoint3: Kabhi bhi restore kiya ja sakta hai
team.bulkArchiveConfirm: Chune gaye members ko archive karein?
team.bulkArchiveDesc: Members archived tab me chale jayenge. Aap unhe baad me restore kar sakte hain.
team.deleteDesc: Yeh member aur unka saara sambandhit data system se hamesha ke liye delete kar dega. Yeh action wapas nahi liya ja sakta.
team.deletePoint1: Saari personal jaankari aur work details
team.deletePoint3: Bank details, transactions, aur saare records
team.grantAccessDesc: Invite bhejein taaki ye karmchari mobile app se apna data dekh sake.
team.grantAccessDrawerSubtitle: Role, permissions aur delivery ek hi step me set karein.
team.grantAccessLoadingContext: Invite context load ho raha hai…
team.grantContextWarmDesc: {name} ({identifier}) ko app me notification milega. SMS ki zaroorat nahi.
team.grantContextColdDesc: {identifier} ke paas abhi manekhr account nahi hai. Hum sign-up link bhejenge.
team.grantConflictDesc: {identifier} pehle se hi is workspace me {name} ke account se link hai.
team.grantConflictAction1: Is karmchari ka mobile / email update karein, phir dobara try karein.
team.grantConflictAction2: Ya pehle {name} ke record se linkage hatayein.
team.grantAlreadyGrantedDesc: Is member ke paas pehle se hi app access hai. Unki lifecycle manage karne ke liye App access section use karein.
team.grantPermissionsHelper: Default chune gaye role se aate hain. Zaroorat ho tabhi alag actions override karein.
team.grantDeliveryWarmHelper: Jaane-maane users ke liye app me notification apne-aap jaata hai. SMS aur email vaikalpik backup hain.
team.grantDeliveryColdHelper: Invite link karmchari tak kaise pahunche woh chunein. Email na ho to bhi SMS kaam karta hai.
team.grantWarmSuccessToast: {name} ko access diya gaya. Ab woh apne notifications me dekhenge.
team.grantAlreadyInvitedRefreshing: Is member ko pehle se invite bhej diya hai. Refresh ho raha hai…

invitedShare.title: Invite link
invitedShare.description: {name} ko invite bhej diya hai. Zarurat pade to yeh link kabhi bhi share kar sakte hain.

team.grantColdLinkCopiedToast: Invite link clipboard par copy ho gaya. Ise kahin bhi share karein.
team.grantInlineFormSubtitle: Niche diye steps follow karein. Access dene se role, permissions save hote hain aur invite bhejta hai, sab ek hi click me.
team.grantStep2NeedRole: Iski default permissions dekhne aur badalne ke liye pehle ek role chunein.
team.grantStep2DefaultsHint: {role} role ke defaults use kar rahe hain. Is karmchari ko apvaad chahiye tabhi customize karein.
team.grantStep2CollapseCta: Iske badle role default use karein ↺
team.accessOverridesEmbeddedUsingDefaults: {role} role ke defaults use ho rahe hain. Override karne ke liye niche koi bhi cell badlein.
team.accessOverridesImmediateHint: Badlav alag se save hote hain aur kuchh minute me lagu ho jate hain. User ko unki agli action par nayi permission dikhegi.
team.quickGrantPermissionsHint: Per-employee permission override chahiye? Employee ke detail page → App access tab kholein.
team.accessNoneWarmDesc: {name} ka mobile maujooda manekhr account se match karta hai. Access dene par unhe app me turant pata chal jaayega. Koi SMS kharch nahi.
team.accessNoneColdDesc: {identifier} ko sign-up link bhejein. manekhr account banane ke baad ve aapke workspace me join hote hain.
team.accessNoneConflictDesc: {identifier} {name} ke account se registered hai. Solve karne ke liye is employee ka contact update karein.
team.accessNoneConflictCtaHint: Is karmchari ka mobile ya email update karne ke liye upar diye Edit Profile button ka upyog karein, phir dobara try karein.

grantAccessSuccess.title: Invite share karne ke liye taiyar hai
grantAccessSuccess.description: Ye link {name} ke sath share karein taaki ve sign up karke aapke workspace me join kar saken.
grantAccessSuccess.autoDescription: Invite {identifier} par bhej diya. Aap yeh link {name} ko WhatsApp ya kisi aur tarah se bhi share kar sakte hain.
grantAccessSuccess.linkOnlyDescription: {name} ko invite karne ke liye yeh link use karein. Copy karein ya WhatsApp par share karein.
grantAccessSuccess.warmDescription: {name} ke paas pehle se manekhr account hai - unhe app mein notification bhej diya. Notification miss ho jaaye to yeh link bhi share kar sakte hain.
grantAccessSuccess.copyFailed: Copy nahi ho saka. Link select karke khud copy karein.
grantAccessSuccess.shareMessage: Namaste {name}, workspace me join karne ke liye ye link use karein: {url}
grantAccessSuccess.emailSubject: Workspace me join karne ke liye aapka invite
grantAccessSuccess.expiryNote: Link 7 din me expire ho jata hai. Is link wala koi bhi vyakti matching phone ya email se sign up kar sakta hai.

grantAccessEmpty.title: Abhi tak koi role nahi
grantAccessEmpty.description: Is teammate ko jo permissions deni hain unke saath kam se kam ek role banayein.

team.resignDesc: Ye member ko inactive mark karega aur unki resign date record karega.
team.offboardDesc: Aakhri kaam ka din specify karein. Is din ke ant me member apne aap workspace access kho dega.
team.notesReasonPlaceholder: jaise, doosre mauke ke liye resign kiya
team.memberStaleRefreshing: Yeh member pehle se archive ho chuka lagta hai. List abhi refresh kar rahe hain.

lifecycleHelp.deactivate: Is member ko pause karein. Ve directory mein rahenge aur aap kabhi bhi reactivate kar sakte hain. Chhutti, sabbatical, ya temporary suspension ke liye istemaal karein.
lifecycleHelp.archive: Is member ko active directory se hatayein aur unka app access band karein. Baad mein restore kiya jaa sakta hai. Jab employee company chhode tab istemaal karein.
lifecycleHelp.deletePermanently: Is row ko workspace se hard-delete karein. Vyakti ka manekhr account affect nahi hota. Wo dusri jin workspaces se jude hain unmein access rakhte hain.

team.bulkDeactivated: Chune gaye members safaltapoorvak deactivate kiye gaye
team.bulkReactivated: Selected members safaltapoorvak reactivate ho gaye
team.bulkArchived: Chune gaye members safaltapoorvak archive ho gaye
team.bulkRestored: Chune gaye members safaltapoorvak restore ho gaye
team.bulkDeleteDesc: Isse selected members aur unka saara data permanently delete ho jayega. Ye wapas nahi laaya ja sakta.
team.bulkDeletedPermanently: Selected members permanently delete ho gaye
team.bulkDeletePartial: {ok} delete hue, {failed} delete nahi ho sake
team.selectArchivedForBulk: Is action ke liye archived members select karein
team.bulkDeactivateConfirm: Chune gaye members ko deactivate karna hai?
team.bulkRestoreConfirm: Chune gaye members ko restore karein?
team.bulkReactivateConfirm: Chune gaye members ko reactivate karna hai?
team.selectSameStatusForBulk: Bulk actions karne ke liye same status wale members chunein
team.upgradeRequired: Is feature ke liye upgrade karein
team.monthlyEmailLimitReached: Masik email limit poori ho gayi ({used}/{limit})
team.noMembersMatchFilters: Aapke filters se koi member match nahi karta
team.detailNotFoundSubtitle: Yeh member delete ho gaya ho sakta hai ya aapke paas access nahi hai.
team.detailFillRequiredSection: Kripya {section} section me zaruri fields poora karein.
team.detailLeaveContent: Aapke paas save na kiye gaye badlav hain. Is page ko chhodkar unhe discard karein?
team.detailDiscardTitle: Bina save kiye badlav chhod dein?
team.detailDiscardContent: Is member par aapke save kiye bina badlav hain. Unhe discard karke edit mode se bahar niklein?
team.accessStatusNoneDesc: Is member ke paas abhi manekhr app ki access nahi hai.
team.accessStatusInvitedDesc: Invite bheja gaya hai. Access paane ke liye member ise accept kar sakta hai.
team.accessStatusActiveDesc: Yeh member {role} role ke saath sign in kar sakta hai.
team.accessExpiryCountdown: Invite {days} din me expire ho jata hai.
team.accessRevokeInviteTooltip: Pending invitation cancel karein aur member ko bina access ke reset karein.
team.accessRevokeConfirmContent: Is workspace me is member ke active sessions turant samapt ho jaayenge. Unka data record rahega. Aap baad me dobara access de sakte hain.
team.accessResendMethodBoth: Bhejein aur share link bhi wapas dein
team.accessResendEmailPlaceholder: Stored email use karne ke liye khaali chhodein
team.accessResendForceRegenerate: Naya token generate karein (pichhla link invalid ho jaata hai)
team.accessResendChannelInAppHint: Invitee ko manekhr app mein turant notification milegi.
team.accessResendChannelInAppDisabled: Invitee ke manekhr account banane ke baad hi available hoga.
team.accessResendChannelEmailDisabled: Email file mein nahi hai. Profile par add karein.
team.accessResendChannelSmsDisabled: Mobile file mein nahi hai. Profile par add karein.
team.accessResendChannelWhatsappHint: Resend ke baad nayi link ke saath WhatsApp khulega.
team.accessResendChannelWhatsappDisabled: WhatsApp share ke liye profile par mobile add karein.
team.accessResendJustRotate: Bas link rotate karein, main khud share karunga
team.accessResendJustRotateHint: Email/SMS/in-app notification bheje bina naya link banata hai. Niche ke panel se aap khud share karein.
team.accessResendShareHint: Yeh link rakhne wala koi bhi invite accept kar sakta hai. Yeh 7 din me khatm ho jaata hai.
team.accessOverridesSubtitle: {role} role ke upar alag actions allow ya deny karein.
team.accessOverridesSaveFailed: Permission overrides save nahi ho sake
team.newSubtitle: Apne workspace me naya member add karne ke liye niche ki details bharein.
team.newReviewSubtitle: Niche ki details confirm karein. Badlav karne ke liye aap kisi bhi step par wapas ja sakte hain.
team.newLookupErrorTitle: Workspace data load nahi ho saka
team.newLoadFailed: Workspace data load karne me viphal
team.newStepError: Aage badhne se pehle is step ki errors theek karein
team.newDocQueued: Document queue me hai. Save karne ke baad upload hoga.
team.newEmpCodeBumped: Karmchari code {code} par update hua (doosra member pehle add hua).
team.newDocsPartial: {ok} upload hue, {failed} viphal - member ki profile se dobara koshish karein.
team.newDocsAllFailed: Documents upload karne me viphal - member ki profile se dobara try karein.
team.newAccessHandoffSubtitle: Create ke baad, is member ki profile ke App access tab se sign-in access de sakte hain - role chunein, permissions adjust karein aur invite bhejne ka tarika pasand karein.
team.newMobileConflictNamed: Ye mobile number pehle se hi {name} use kar rahe hain
team.newMobileConflictAnon: Yeh mobile number pehle se kisi aur team member dwara use ho raha hai
team.newEmailConflictNamed: Yeh email pehle se {name} use kar rahe hain
team.newEmailConflictAnon: Yeh email pehle se hi doosre team member dwara istemaal ho raha hai
team.newReviewSectionEmploymentHelper: Role, schedule, muavza aur kanooni jaankari.
team.newReviewSectionBankHelper: Payment method aur account ki jaankari.
team.newReviewSectionDocumentsHelper: Member banne ke baad upload ke liye files taiyar hain.
team.newReviewSectionEmpty: Is section ke liye kuch darj nahi hai.
team.bankPreferredMethodHelper: Yeh member apni salary kaise paata hai.
team.bankDetailsHelper: Salary transfer ke liye bank account ki jaankari.
team.bankAccountHolderRequired: Account holder ka naam zaruri hai
team.bankAccountHolderPlaceholder: Account holder ka naam darj karein
team.bankSameAsEmployeeTooltip: Member ke poore naam (step 1) se account holder ka naam apne aap bharta hai. Alag naam daalne ke liye band karein (jaise joint account, mata-pita ka account).
team.bankSameAsEmployeeIconAria: Karmchari jaisa hi kya karta hai?
team.bankAccountNumberExtra: 9 se 18 ank, koi space ya dash nahi.
team.bankConfirmAccountExtra: Confirm karne ke liye dobara type karein - salary-mahatvapoorn data me typing galtiyon se bachata hai.
team.bankIfscInvalid: Kripya maanya IFSC code darj karein (jaise, HDFC0001234)
team.bankUpiIdInvalid: Kripya valid UPI ID darj karein (jaise, name@upi)
team.bankQrCodeHelper: Vaikalpik. Seedhe salary scan ke liye member ka UPI QR - bank transfer mukhya tareeka ho tab bhi upyogi.
team.docsAlertSaveFirst: Naye member ko save karne ke baad documents upload honge.
team.docsEmptyAll: Abhi tak koi document upload nahi hua.
team.personalSectionHelper: Is member ki mukhya sampark aur pehchaan ki jaankari.
team.personalInvalidMobile: Sahi Bharatiya mobile number darj karein (10 ank, 6, 7, 8 ya 9 se shuru ho)
team.personalInvalidEmail: Kripya sahi email address darj karein
team.personalInvalidEmpCode: Sirf akshar, ank, hyphen aur underscore manya hain (adhiktam 32 akshar).
team.personalInvalidEmergencyMobile: Sahi Bharatiya mobile number darj karein (10 ank, +91 prefix vaikalpik)
team.personalEmpCodeHelpAuto: Auto-assign ke liye khaali chhodein. Manya: A–Z, a–z, 0–9, - _
team.personalEmpCodeHelpDisabled: Auto-assigned - is workspace ke liye custom code band hain.
team.personalEmpCodeLockTitle: Karmchari code banane ke baad badla nahi ja sakta
team.personalEmpCodePermanent: Sthayi - salary slip aur audit export mein istemal hota hai.
team.personalEmpCodeGeneratedNote: Yeh code apne aap ban jaata hai aur member create hone ke baad badla nahi ja sakta.
team.createDesignationDuplicate: Yeh pad pehle se hi maujood hai
team.selfNoProfileTitle: Abhi tak koi profile link nahi hui
team.selfNoProfileBody: Is workspace me aapka account kisi team member record se juda nahi hai. Workspace malik se ek set up karne ko kahein.
team.selfManagedFieldsTitle: Workspace malik dwara manage kiya jata hai
team.selfManagedFieldsBody: Aapka pad, muavza, role aur bank details workspace malik dwara manage kiye jaate hain. Aap abhi bhi apni personal aur contact details update kar sakte hain.
team.workEmploymentHelper: Job role, joining date, aur access permissions.
team.workCompensationHelper: Work schedule, shift assignments aur salary details.
team.workSalaryCalcHelper: Payroll mahina kaise napein aur hajiri salary par asar kare ya nahi woh chunein.
team.workRequiredJoining: Join hone ki date zaruri hai
team.workLockedRoleTooltip: Role-based access control chalu karne ke liye apna plan upgrade karein
team.workPlaceholderLockedRole: Roles unlock karne ke liye upgrade karein
team.workTooltipReportsTo: Hajiri regularization ke liye approval chain me manager.
team.workInvalidSalary: Salary rakam 0 se zyada honi chahiye
team.workInvalidFixedMonthDays: 1 aur 31 ke beech ki value darj karein
team.workAttendanceDisabledBanner: Is workspace ke liye hajiri-aadharit salary band hai. Payroll settings me workspace feature chalu na hone tak salary hajiri ko ignore karegi.
team.workOverrideHelper: Zarurat ho to calculate ki gayi salary override karein.
team.workPlaceholderOverride: Calculate ki gayi value use karne ke liye khali rakhein
team.workCtcHelpEnter: Dekhne ke liye upar saalana CTC dalein
team.workUanExtra: EPFO se 12-ank ka Universal Account Number (jaise 100200300400).
team.workTaxRegimeHelp: Budget 2023 ke anusaar default roop se nayi regime lagu hoti hai.
team.workPfHelp: Opt-out sirf tab valid jab gross > ₹15,000.
team.workLabelPfOptedOut: Karmchari ne PF se opt out kiya
team.workEsiHelp: Gross ≤ ₹21,000/mahina hone par apne aap laagu.
team.workNonItrWarningBody: Section 206AB ke anusaar TDS 20% flat rate par kaata jaayega. Ise tab hi mark karein jab karmchari ne lagataar 2 saal ITR file na kiya ho aur har saal TDS Rs. 50,000 se zyada ho.
team.karigarMarkAsLabel: Karigar ke roop me mark karein
team.karigarMarkAsExtra: Is vyakti ko job-work challan me assign karne aur unka production track karne ke liye enable karein
team.karigarDailyRateExtra: Job-work challan post karte samay snapshot liya jata hai. Yeh rate badalne se purane record update nahi honge.
team.docPreviewUnavailable: Is file type ke liye preview uplabdh nahi hai.
team.docUploadDropText: File yahan drag and drop karein, ya browse karne ke liye click karein
team.formatServiceDuration: {years, plural, =0 {0 saal} one {# saal} other {# saal}} {months, plural, =0 {0 mahine} one {# mahina} other {# mahine}}
team.workMinWageOverrideExtra: Workspace default use karne ke liye khali chhodein.

salaryTab.kpiYtdPaidHint: Chaalu vittiya varsh me kul paid

regularizations.emptyText: Is member ke liye koi regularization request nahi hai.
regularizations.rowCount: {count, plural, one {# request} other {# requests}}, {pending} lambit

attendanceWorkspace.exportEmpty: Is mahine ke liye export karne ke liye koi attendance nahi hai
attendanceWorkspace.exportError: Export fail hua. Kripya dobara koshish karein.

team.accessOverridesRowInheritTip: Role se poora module inherit karein
team.accessOverridesRowAllowTip: Is module me har action ki anumati dein
team.accessOverridesRowDenyTip: Is module me har action deny karein

team.accessOverridesScopeAllTip: Har member ke records par kaam karta hai

overview.operationsSectionDescription: Widget ki rang-coding chalane wale settings

noWorkspace.title: Koi workspace chuna nahi gaya
noWorkspace.description: Apni team manage karna shuru karne ke liye workspace banayein.

createForm.explainer: Workspace aapki company ya team ko darshata hai. Aapko pure control ke saath Malik banaya jayega. Aap baad mein team members ko invite kar sakte hain aur settings configure kar sakte hain.
createForm.businessDetailsHint: GST aur tax jaankari abhi add karein, ya chhod dein aur baad mein Finance module mein pura karein.
createForm.fyStartMonthLabel: Fiscal year shuru hone ka mahina

generalSettings.title: General settings
generalSettings.subtitle: Workspace naam aur location update karein
generalSettings.addressPlaceholder: Pura postal address - karmchari ID card par chhapta hai

business.title: Business profile
business.subtitle: GST, PAN, business type - Finance module use karta hai
business.missingDescription: Aapki business profile apne aap nahi bani. Set karne ke liye niche click karein - default lagu honge aur baad me aap unhe sudhar sakte hain.
business.setupFailed: Business profile set karne me viphal
business.saveFailed: Business profile save karne me viphal
business.description: Is workspace ke liye tax aur kanooni pehchan. Finance module invoicing, GST return aur report ke liye use karta hai.
business.fyStartMonthLabel: Financial year shuru hone ka mahina
business.accountsBeginLabel: Accounts books shuru hone ki tareekh
business.accountsBeginPlaceholder: Aap kab se record karna shuru karte hain?

people.sectionDescription: Team members, roles aur pad ko manage karein

roles.title: Roles aur permissions
roles.subtitle: Aapke workspace me kaun kya access kar sakta hai ye tay karein

designations.title: Pad
designations.subtitle: Team members ko categorize karne ke liye custom pad
designations.description: Team members ko categorize karne ke liye custom pad add karein. Permission role se alag.
designations.empty: Abhi tak koi pad nahi hai.
designations.modalDescription: Apni team members ke liye pad add, edit ya hatayein.
designations.addPlaceholder: jaise Store Manager, Cashier, Security Guard
designations.duplicate: Yeh pad pehle se hi maujood hai
designations.emptyList: Abhi tak koi pad nahi hai
designations.deleteConfirm: Kya aap sach me "{name}" delete karna chahte hain? Yeh pad rakhne wale maujooda team members ise rakhenge, lekin naye members ke liye yeh uplabdh nahi hoga.
designations.localeFallbackHint: Khali hone par dusri bhashayein Angrezi par wapas jaati hain.
designations.customNoTranslate: Custom pad jaise dakhil kiye gaye waise store hote hain aur translate nahi hote.
designations.renameCascadeBody: "{old}" ka naam badal kar "{new}" karne se yeh pad use karne wale {count, plural, one {# team member} other {# team members}} bhi update honge.
designations.renameCascadeNoMembers: Filhaal koi member yeh pad use nahi karta.
designations.renameSuccessToast: Naam badal gaya. {count, plural, one {# member} other {# members}} update hue.
designations.deleteBlockedBody: {count, plural, one {# member} other {# members}} abhi bhi "{canonical}" use karte hain. Pehle unhe dobara assign karein ya hatayein.
designations.deleteConfirmBody: "{canonical}" delete karna hai? Yeh wapas nahi laaya ja sakta.

employeeCode.title: Karmchari code settings
employeeCode.subtitle: Banate samay team members ko apne-aap unique code assign karein
employeeCode.description: Naye team members ko unique karmchari code kaise assign ho ye control karein. Code salary slip, bank report aur audit export par dikhte hain.
employeeCode.noWorkspaceWarning: Karmchari code configure karne ke liye Workspace chunein.
employeeCode.permanentDesc: Ek baar assign hone ke baad, member ka code edit nahi kar sakte. Enable karne se pehle format dhyan se chunein.
employeeCode.adminRequiredTitle: Admin ya Malik access zaruri hai
employeeCode.adminRequiredDesc: Karmchari code settings badalne ke liye aapko Admin ya Malik permission ki zarurat hai.
employeeCode.enableDesc: Save karte samay har team member ko apne-aap unique code assign karein.
employeeCode.formatHelper: Upar diye helper se token use karke format banayein. Isme ek sequence token ({sequenceTokens}) hona zaruri hai. Aap type karte hain to niche ka preview live update hota hai.
employeeCode.quickExamplesLabel: Quick examples - apply karne ke liye click karein
employeeCode.prefixHelper: Aapke format me {prefixToken} token ko badalta hai. Adhik se adhik 16 akshar. Manya: A–Z, a–z, 0–9, hyphen, underscore
employeeCode.startingNumberTooltipP1: Code banate samay use hone wala pehla sequence number.
employeeCode.startingNumberTooltipP2: Counter track karta hai ki ab tak kitne code reserve hue hain. Ek baar code assign hone ke baad, aap sirf shuruaat ka number badha sakte hain - current counter se niche kam nahi kar sakte.
employeeCode.startingNumberTooltipP3: Next dikhata hai ki agle naye member ko theek kaunsa sequence milega.
employeeCode.counterTooltip: Ab tak reserve hue kul code. Aap shuruaat ka number is value se niche set nahi kar sakte.
employeeCode.nextTooltip: Agle naye member ko jo sequence number milega.
employeeCode.allowCustomDesc: Member add karte samay Admin ko apne-aap bane code ko badalne dein.
employeeCode.formatChangeWarning: Format badalne se maujuda members par asar nahi hota. Ve apne current code rakhenge. Naye members naye format ka upyog karenge.
employeeCode.errorFormatNeedsSequence: Format me ek sequence token ({#}, {##}, {###}, ya {####}) hona zaruri hai.
employeeCode.errorFormatChars: Format me sirf akshar, numbers, underscore, hyphen, { }, aur # ho sakte hain.
employeeCode.errorPrefixChars: Prefix me sirf akshar, numbers, underscore, hyphen, { }, aur # ho sakte hain.

recovery.subtitle: Delete kiye gaye workspace 30 din tak wapas paye ja sakte hain. Uske baad, unhe wapas pane ke liye support se sampark karein.

recovery.loadFailed: Delete kiye gaye workspace load nahi ho sake
recovery.daysLeft: {count, plural, one {# din baaki} other {# din baaki}}
recovery.windowExpired: Yah workspace 30 din se zyada pahle delete hua tha aur ab yahan se wapas nahi mil sakta. Ise wapas pane ke liye support se sampark karein.
recovery.confirmDescription: Yah workspace ko uske sabhi members aur records ke saath wapas le aata hai. Suraksha ke liye, kiosk aur device token tab tak band rahenge jab tak aap unhe dobara set nahi karte.

leave.confirmDescription: Aap turant is workspace ka access kho denge. Owner aapko baad me dobara invite kar sakta hai.

rehire.noticeTitle: Yah vyakti yahan pahle member tha
rehire.noticeRemovedOn: Unhe {date} ko hataya gaya tha. Dobara jodne par unka maujooda record wapas aa jaata hai.
rehire.noticeDeclinedOn: Unhone pahle {date} ko invite decline kiya tha. Dobara jodne par unka maujooda record wapas aa jaata hai.
rehire.noticeGeneric: Unki yahan pahle sadasyata thi. Dobara jodne par unka maujooda record wapas aa jaata hai.

attendance.record: Daily hajiri record - ek din ke liye vyakti ki sthiti (Hajar, Gerhajar, Aadha din, Chhutti par). Dekhein record dekhta hai, Mark din ki sthiti set karta hai, Edit save kiya record badalta hai, Delete ek hata deta hai. Self scope matlab sirf aapke khud ke din; All matlab sabhi.
attendance.selfPunch: Member ka khud ka check-in / check-out clock. Punch karne ke liye yeh permission aur workspace ki 'Self check-in' policy chalu honi zaruri hai (Workspace settings, Hajiri). Akeli permission kaafi nahi hai.
attendance.analytics: Org-wide hajiri dashboard aur report - overview, muster grid, overtime, compliance, gerhajari pattern. Read-only aur workspace-wide.
attendance.export: Hajiri aur statutory export download karein (registers, PF / ESI files).
attendance.events: Raw punch-event log - har check-in aur check-out, biometric device sahit. Delete ek galat punch ko void karta hai. Yeh punch ka audit view hai, punch karne ka kaam nahi (woh Self check-in hai).
attendance.anomaly: Anomalies queue - flag kiye gaye irregular punch aur pattern, saath me unhe detect karne wale niyam.
attendance.device: Biometric device aur kiosk setup - punch hardware register, assign aur configure karein.
attendance.policy: Hajiri policies - hajiri compute hone par lagu hone wale late-arrival, early-departure, overtime aur comp-off niyam.

leave.request: Chhutti applications - chhutti apply karein, apni requests dekhein, aur unhe cancel ya withdraw karein. Self matlab aapki khud ki; All matlab kisi ke taraf se apply ya dekhein.
leave.approval: Apni approval chain me chhutti requests manjur karein ya reject karein. Vyakti kabhi apni khud ki request manjur nahi kar sakta.
leave.balance: Har leave type ke hisaab se chhutti balance - opening, accrued, used aur available.
leave.compOff: Comp-off - kaam kiye gaye holiday ya weekly-off ka claim karein (apply) aur claims manjur karein (decide). Self-claim ke liye workspace self-service policy bhi zaruri hai.
leave.type: Leave-type catalogue configure karein - paid aur unpaid types, accrual, aur saal ke ant me carry-forward.
leave.settings: Workspace leave settings - approval chain, sandwich-leave niyam, retro window, aur manual balance adjustment.
leave.delegation: Coverage window ke liye apni approval authority doosre approver ko delegate karein.

regularization.request: Hajiri-correction requests - pichhle din ke liye correction uthaayein, apni requests dekhein, aur unhe cancel karein. Self-raise ke liye workspace self-service policy bhi zaruri hai.
regularization.approval: Apni chain me hajiri-correction requests manjur karein ya reject karein. Vyakti kabhi apni khud ki manjur nahi kar sakta.
regularization.settings: Regularization workflow config - approval levels, retro window, aur attachment limits.

holidays.calendar: Workspace ka chhutti calendar - sabhi ke liye saanjha gair-kaaryakari din. Dekhne se sadasya calendar dekh sakta hai; Jodein, Sampadan aur Hatayein prabandhak kriyaayein hain. Chhuttiyan workspace-vyapi sandarbh jankari hain, isliye koi swa ya sabhi scope nahi - sabhi saman suchi dekhte hain.

finance.invoice: Vikray kar invoice. Dekhein invoice dekhta hai, Banayein aur Sampadan draft par kaam karte hain, Post karein draft ko kramankit, khaata-asarkari invoice mein antim banata hai, Hatayein draft rad karta hai, aur Bhejein use email, WhatsApp ya SMS dwara pahunchata hai. Swa scope ka matlab sirf sadasya dwara banaye invoice; sabhi ka matlab har invoice. Bhejein aur Hatayein samvedansheel hain: bhejne se sanchar credit kharch hota hai aur rad karne se invoice hat jata hai.
finance.creditNote: Post kiye invoice ke khilaaf credit note. Ek banane se output kar aur invoice ki baki rakam ulat jaati hai (dhaara 34), isliye ye samvedansheel aur khaata-asarkari hai. Swa ka matlab sadasya ke apne invoice ke khilaaf; sabhi ka matlab koi bhi invoice.
finance.expense: Vyapar ke kharch (kiraya, bijli, rakhrakhav, vividh). Dekhein kharch dekhta hai, Banayein naya darj karta hai. Swa ka matlab sirf sadasya ki apni entry; sabhi ka matlab sabki.
finance.payment: Invoice ke khilaaf prapt bhugtan darj karein. Swa ka matlab sadasya ke apne invoice ke khilaaf; sabhi ka matlab koi bhi invoice.
finance.report: Finance dashboard aur party / laabh-haani report. Keval-padhne ke liye aur workspace-vyapi, isliye koi swa ya sabhi scope nahi.
finance.gst: GST configuration - dar, return, aur e-invoice / e-way settings. Ek samvedansheel anupalan satah.
finance.settings: Finance aur firm settings - branding, invoice number shrenkhala, aur firm-anusar anupalan profile. Ek samvedansheel prabandhak satah.

editor.sectionAccrualHint: Saal ke dauraan balance kaise jama hota hai.
editor.annualQuantityHint: Poori entitlement saal ki shuruaat me jama hoti hai.
editor.rateHint: Cap tak pohchne tak har period jama hota hai.
editor.proRateHint: Period ke beech me judne wale member ko proportionate jama milta hai.
editor.accrualCapHint: Adhik se adhik jitna jama ho sake. Cap na ho to khali rakhein.
editor.eligibleAfterHint: Yeh chhutti accrue hona shuru ho us se pehle member ko poori karni wali tenure.
editor.sectionYearEndHint: Saal band hone par unused balance ka kya hota hai.
editor.carryForwardHint: Agle saal me le jaa sakte hain wo din. 0 matlab kuch carry nahi hota.
editor.lapseExcessHint: Carry-forward cap se upar ka sab forfeit ho jata hai.
editor.encashableHint: Unused chhutti year-end par aur full-and-final settlement me pay out ki ja sakti hai.
editor.encashmentCapHint: Adhik se adhik jitne din encash ho sakte hain. Cap na ho to khali rakhein.
editor.sectionCompOffHint: Holiday ya weekly-off par kaam karke kamaye comp-off type ke roop me ise mark karein.
editor.isCompOffHint: Sirf manjur comp-off request ke zariye, expire hone wale lot me jama hota hai.
editor.validityDaysHint: Kamaya comp-off lot expire hone se pehle kitni der tak usable rehta hai.
editor.sectionApplicabilityHint: Yeh chhutti type kis ke liye uplabdh hai.
editor.genderHint: Kisi gender tak seemit karein - jaise maternity ya paternity leave.
editor.minTenureHint: Itne din ki seva poori karne ke baad hi member apply kar sakte hain.

accrual.title: Accrual
accrual.body: Yeh chhutti ka prakar balance me kaise jama hota hai - saal me ek baar pehle se diya jaaye, saal ke dauraan tay dar par dheere dheere accrue ho, ya bilkul accrue na ho (manually ya comp-off se jama).

statutory.title: Vaidhanik aadhar
statutory.body: Yeh chhutti ka prakar jis shram kanoon se judta hai. Yeh salahkari nyuntam-hakdari check chalata hai - udaharan ke liye Factories Act ya Shops & Establishments Act. "Svaichchhik" matlab prakar company policy hai, koi vaidhanik floor nahi.

yearEnd.title: Saal ke ant ki vyavastha
yearEnd.body: Chhutti ka saal band hone par istemal na kiye gaye balance ka kya hota hai - tay seema tak ke din agle saal me le jaayein, extra lapse hone dein, ya use encashment ke roop me chukta kar dein.

approvals.title: Chhutti Approvals
approvals.subtitle: Workspace ki chhutti aur comp-off requests review karein aur decide karein.

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: Aapke paas chhutti approvals dekhne ki permission nahi hai. Access ke liye apne workspace malik se sampark karein.

approvals.emptySub: Is filter se abhi kuch match nahi ho raha.

detail.autoApproved: Approval chain nahi - apne aap manjur.

lwp.title: LWP - Bina pagar ki chhutti
lwp.body: Request me ke vo din jo paid balance se cover nahi hote. Ve chhutti ke roop me manjur to hote hain par bina pagar ke hote hain, isliye payroll us period ke liye unhe deduct karta hai.

retroactive.title: Backdated request
retroactive.body: Yeh request aisi tareekhon ko cover karti hai jo pehle hi guzar chuki hain. Yeh Leave Settings me set ki gayi back-dating window me allowed hai, aur yahan flag ki gayi hai taaki approver ise dhyan se dekh sake.

chain.title: Approval chain
chain.body: Approver ki kramwar list jisme se yeh request guzarti hai. Har level par manjuri zaruri hai tabhi aage badhti hai; kisi bhi level par reject request ko rok deta hai. "Apne aap manjur" matlab koi approval chain set nahi hai.

settings.title: Chhutti Settings
settings.subtitle: Approval workflow set karein aur approver delegations manage karein.
settings.loadError: Chhutti settings load nahi ho sake.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.message: Aapke pass chhutti settings manage karne ki permission nahi hai. Access ke liye apne workspace malik se sampark karein.

settings.workflowDesc: Chhutti aur comp-off requests kaun review karta hai, aur ek raise hone par lagu hone wale niyam.
settings.approverChainHint: Requests in approvers ke through order me jati hain. Khali chain har request ko apne aap approve kar deti hai.
settings.noApprovers: Koi approver nahi - requests submit hote hi apne aap approve ho jati hain.
settings.sandwichHint: On hone par, chhutti ke span ke andar aane wale holiday aur weekly-off bhi charge hote hain.
settings.retroHint: Past-dated chhutti request kitni peeche tak ja sakti hai.
settings.maxAttachHint: Ek request ke sath member zyada se zyada kitni file attach kar sakta hai.
settings.delegDesc: Approver apna approval adhikar ek coverage window ke liye delegate ko de sakta hai - jaise jab woh bahar ho.
settings.revokeConfirm: Is delegation ko revoke karna hai?
settings.revokeConfirmDesc: Delegate turant hi aapke taraf se kaam karne ki kshamta kho deta hai.
settings.createHint: Aap apni khud ki approval authority delegate kar rahe hain. Delegate is window ke dauraan un requests par action le sakta hai jaha aap approver hain.

sandwich.title: Sandwich chhutti
sandwich.body: On hone par, do chhutti ke dino ke beech aane wala holiday ya weekly off bhi chhutti maana jaata hai. Off hone par, sirf actual chhutti ke din hi balance se kaate jaate hain.

delegation.title: Approver delegation
delegation.body: Ek nishchit window ke liye approver ki leave-approval duties asthayi roop se doosre user ko sope - jab approver khud chhutti par ho tab upyogi. Window khatam hone par delegation apne aap khatam ho jaata hai.

balances.title: Chhutti Balances
balances.subtitle: Har member ki saal ki accrued, used aur available chhutti - manual corrections ke saath.
balances.loadError: Chhutti balances load nahi ho payi.

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: Aapko chhutti balances dekhne ki permission nahi hai. Access ke liye apne workspace malik se sampark karein.

balances.emptySub: Chhutti accrue hone par balance dikhega. Agle accrual run ke baad phir check karein.
balances.qtyHint: Positive value din credit karta hai; negative value debit karta hai. Aadhe din allowed hain.
balances.reasonPlaceholder: Yeh correction kyun kiya ja raha hai - ledger par record hota hai
balances.reasonRequired: Har adjustment ke liye karan zaruri hai.

opening.title: Opening balance
opening.body: Pichhle chhutti saal se is saal me laaya gaya balance - har chhutti type ke saal-ant carry-forward niyam se capped.

credited.title: Credited
credited.body: Is saal ke dauran balance me jode gaye din - accrual runs, upfront annual grant, ya approved comp-off se.

pending.title: Lambit
pending.body: Submit huyi par abhi tak approve na huyi chhutti requests se locked din. Yeh alag rakhe jaate hain taaki available figure zyada na dikhe.

adjustment.title: Manual adjustment
adjustment.body: Ledger par seedha record kiya gaya correction. Positive value din credit karta hai, negative value debit karta hai. Har adjustment audit ke liye karan ke saath record hota hai.

calendar.title: Kaun chhutti par hai
calendar.subtitle: Poori team ki manjur chhutti ka mahine-war view, sath me holiday bhi dikhaye gaye hain.
calendar.loadError: Chhutti ka calendar load nahi ho saka.

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: Aapke paas chhutti ka calendar dekhne ki permission nahi hai. Access ke liye apne workspace malik se sampark karein.

calendar.emptyTitle: Is mahine koi chhutti par nahi hai
calendar.emptySub: Chune gaye mahine me koi manjur chhutti nahi aati.

legend.title: Calendar kaise padhein
legend.body: Har rangin square manjur chhutti ka ek din dikhata hai, jo chhutti ke type ke hisab se range hua hai. Halka square aadha din hai; gehra square poora din hai. Shaded column holiday ya weekly-off hain. Yahan chhutti ke din me paid din aur unpaid din (LWP) dono aate hain - aise din jo paid balance me cover nahi hote, jinhe payroll kaat leta hai.

me.title: Meri Chhutti
me.subtitle: Aapki chhutti balance, applications aur history.
me.loadError: Aapki chhutti load nahi ho saki.
me.selfApplyDisabledNote: Aap chhutti apply kar sakte hain, par is workspace ke liye abhi self-service chhutti band hai. Ise chalu karne ke liye admin se kahein, Workspace, Attendance settings me.
me.noBalancesSub: Aapko chhutti credit hote hi balance yahan dikhega.

noActivity.title: Abhi tak koi chhutti gatividhi nahi
noActivity.subtitle: Aapki chhutti balance aur applications yahan dikhengi.

me.historyEmptySub: Aap apply karenge to aapki chhutti requests yahan dikhengi.
me.cancelConfirmDesc: Yeh lambit request cancel ho jayegi. Aap kabhi bhi dobara apply kar sakte hain.
me.withdrawConfirm: Is manjur chhutti ko wapas lein?
me.withdrawConfirmDesc: Manjur chhutti reverse ho jati hai aur din aapke balance me wapas aa jate hain.

drawer.reasonPlaceholder: Aapke approver ke liye ek chhoti note
drawer.previewZero: Is range me koi chargeable kaam ke din nahi hai - ye poori tarah holiday ya weekly-off par aate hai.
drawer.previewLwpWarn: {n, plural, one {# din unpaid rahega} other {# din unpaid rahenge}} - aapka paid balance poori request cover nahi karta.

lwp.title: LWP - Leave Without Pay
lwp.body: Request ke wo din jo paid balance se cover nahi hote. Wo leave ke roop me manjur to hote hai par unpaid hote hai, isliye payroll us period ke liye unki deduction karta hai.

halfDay.title: Half day
halfDay.body: Din ke sirf ek hisse ke liye leave lein. "Pehla half" subah cover karta hai, "doosra half" dopahar - har ek balance ke against 0.5 din ginta hai.

leaveType.title: Leave type
leaveType.body: Leave ki wajah - har type apne balance se leta hai. Holiday ya weekly off par kaam karke kamaya time use karne ke liye "Comp-off" chunein; use pehle My Comp-off ke neeche claim karein.

compOff.title: Meri compensatory chhutti
compOff.subtitle: Holiday aur weekly-off par kaam karne ke liye aapne jo compensatory chhutti kamayi hai.
compOff.loadError: Aapki compensatory chhutti load nahi ho saki.

accessDenied.title: Access mana
accessDenied.message: Aapko compensatory chhutti claim karne ki permission nahi hai. Access ke liye apne workspace malik se sampark karein.

compOff.selfClaimDisabledNote: Aap compensatory chhutti claim kar sakte hain, par is workspace ke liye abhi self-service chhutti band hai. Ise enable karne ke liye Workspace, Hajiri settings me admin se kahein.
compOff.statExpiringSoon: 14 din me khatam ho rahi hai
compOff.useHint: Compensatory chhutti use karne ke liye, Meri Chhutti par jaayein, chhutti apply karein, aur Comp-off type chunein.
compOff.lotsEmptySub: Claim approve hone ke baad compensatory chhutti yahan dikhegi.

lots.expiresInDays: {n, plural, one {# din me} other {# din me}}

compOff.historyEmptySub: Aap claim submit karenge to aapke compensatory chhutti claim yahan dikhenge.
compOff.cancelConfirm: Is claim ko cancel karna hai?
compOff.cancelConfirmDesc: Yeh lambit compensatory chhutti claim cancel ho jayega. Aap kabhi bhi dobara claim kar sakte hain.
compOff.claimed: Compensatory chhutti claim submit ho gaya

drawer.dateHint: Aisa holiday ya weekly-off chunein jis par aapne sach me kaam kiya. Aapka approver har claim verify karta hai.
drawer.dateRequired: Aapne jis din kaam kiya us tareekh ko chunein.
drawer.reasonPlaceholder: Vaikalpik - aapke approver ke liye ek chhota note

compOff.title: Compensatory chhutti (comp-off)
compOff.intro: Ek paid chhutti ka din jo karmchari, jis din uska schedule nahi tha us din - public holiday ya weekly off - kaam karke kamata hai, uske badle extra pay lene ke bajaye.
compOff.step1: Karmchari public holiday ya weekly off par kaam karta hai.
compOff.step2: Ve yahan compensatory chhutti ka claim karte hain, jis din kaam kiya us tareekh ko chunkar.
compOff.step3: Manager claim ki review karta hai aur manjur karta hai.
compOff.step4: Manjur kiye gaye din compensatory chhutti ke ek dated "lot" ke roop me bank ho jaate hain.
compOff.step5: Din ki chhutti lene ke liye, karmchari My Leave me "Comp-off" type ke sath apply karta hai - bina use kiye din lot ke expire hone par expire ho jaate hain.

lot.title: Compensatory chhutti ka lot
lot.body: Har manjur kiya gaya claim apna alag lot banta hai - ek fixed expiry ke sath compensatory chhutti ke dino ka parcel. Lot sabse purane-pehle use hote hain, taaki expire hone ke najdeek din naye se pehle kharch hon.

expiry.title: Lot expiry
expiry.body: Compensatory chhutti hamesha ke liye nahi rehti - har lot kamaye jaane ke ek tay sankhya ke din baad lapse ho jaata hai. Lot ke expiry se pehle jo din aap use nahi karte ve forfeit ho jaate hain.

holidays.title: Chhutti Prabandhan
holidays.subtitle: Workspace ki chhuttiyan aur tyohaar gair-kaaryakari din ke roop mein chihnit.

empty.title: Koi chhutti set nahi hai
empty.subtitle: Haazri aur chhutti mein gair-kaaryakari din ke roop mein chihnit karne ke liye chhuttiyan jodein.

filtered.title: {year} mein is filter se milti koi chhutti nahi hai
filtered.sub: Vyapak drishya ke liye type chip badlein ya recurring toggle saaf karein.

filter.aria: Prakar ke anusaar chhuttiyan filter karein

deleteConfirm.title: Is chhutti ko hatayein?
deleteConfirm.description: Yah poore workspace ke liye chhutti hata deta hai. Aap baad mein dobara jod sakte hain.

drawer.descriptionPlaceholder: Is chhutti ke baare mein vaikalpik note

holidaysCard.title: Chhuttiyan
holidaysCard.count: {count, plural, =0 {Koi chhutti nahi} one {# chhutti} other {# chhuttiyan}}
holidaysCard.empty: {year} ke liye koi chhutti set nahi hai

nextPill.aria: Chhuttiyon ki list kholein. Agli chhutti: {name}, {when}

shifts.title: Shift Prabandhan
shifts.subtitle: Workspace shift catalog. Members apne assigned shift ko team aur attendance views mein dekhte hain.
shifts.saveFailed: Shift save nahi ho saki. Phir koshish karein.
shifts.deleteFailed: Shift hata nahi sake. Phir koshish karein.

summary.count: {count, plural, =0 {Koi shift set nahi hai} one {# shift set hai} other {# shifts set hain}}

accessDenied.title: Pravesh asweekrit
accessDenied.message: Aapke paas shift catalog dekhne ki anumati nahi hai. Pravesh ke liye apne workspace maalik se sampark karein.

empty.title: Koi shift set nahi hai
empty.subtitle: Shift timings set karein taki attendance, payroll, aur team assignment jaane ki har member kab kaam karta hai.

filtered.title: Is filter se milti koi shift nahi hai
filtered.sub: Vyapak drishya ke liye type chip badlein ya filter saaf karein.

typeHint.fixed: Standard start aur end time. Late arrival aur early departure track hote hain.
typeHint.flexi: Koi fixed timing nahi. Din ka mulyankan kul kaam ke ghanton ke aadhaar par hota hai jo neeche di gayi zaruri ghanton se mila ke dekha jata hai.
typeHint.split: Ek din mein kai check-in aur check-out blocks (jaise service mein dopahar ka break).
typeHint.break: Single check-in aur check-out; break punches kaam ke samay se ghata diye jate hain.

filter.aria: Prakar ke anusaar shifts filter karein

deleteConfirm.title: Is shift ko hatayein?
deleteConfirm.description: Yah workspace catalog se shift hata deta hai. Is shift par jo members hain unko phir se assign karna hoga.

drawer.requiredHoursTooltip: Member ko present mark karne ke liye kitne kul ghante kaam karna zaruri hai. Khali rakhne par 8-ghanton ka default use hoga.
drawer.graceTooltip: Shuru hone ke baad kitne minute tak check-in late nahi mana jayega.
drawer.halfDayTooltip: Agar member is many minute se zyada late hai, to din ko half-day mark kiya jayega.
drawer.policyTooltip: Is shift ke liye attendance kis policy se score hogi. Khali rakhne par workspace default policy use hogi.
drawer.defaultLabel: Default ke roop mein set karein

attendance.title: Hajiri

errors.MEMBER_OFFBOARDED: Is member ko hata diya gaya hai. Inki hajiri sirf read-only hai aur kanuni record ke liye rakhi gayi hai.
errors.ATTENDANCE_SELF_EDIT_BLOCKED: Aap apni khud ki hajiri mark ya edit nahi kar sakte. Workspace owner ya kisi aur manager se kahein.
errors.SELF_PUNCH_DISABLED: Is workspace ke liye khud check in band hai. Ise on karne ke liye admin se kahein.
errors.KIOSK_PERIOD_CLOSED: Is period ki hajiri band hai. Kripya apne supervisor se sampark karein.
errors.PAYROLL_LOCKED: Is period ke liye payroll generate ho chuka hai isliye hajiri lock hai.
errors.FUTURE_DATE: Aap future ki tareekh ke liye hajiri mark nahi kar sakte.
errors.generic: Kuch galat ho gaya. Kripya phir se koshish karein.

attendance.headerMetaDaily: {date} · {total, plural, one {# scheduled member} other {# scheduled members}}
attendance.headerMetaDailyScheduled: {total, plural, one {# scheduled member} other {# scheduled members}}
attendance.headerExplainerBody: Aaj ki hajiri har member ke liye alag se ya ek saath mark karein. Roster filter karne ke liye kisi bhi stat tile par click karein. Ek samay me ek din ke liye Dainik aur calendar view ke liye Masik istemaal karein.

tile.presentAria: Hajir sthiti se roster filter karein
tile.unmarkedHintAction: Filter aur mark karne ke liye tap karein
tile.unmarkedAria: Bina mark sthiti se roster filter karein
tile.hoursWorkedHintNoData: Abhi tak koi check in nahi

myAttendance.title: Meri Hajiri
myAttendance.selfPunchDisabledNote: Aap check in kar sakte hain, par is workspace ke liye abhi self check-in band hai. Ise chalu karne ke liye admin se kahein - Workspace, Hajiri settings me.
myAttendance.tapDayHint: Apne check in aur check out time dekhne ke liye kisi bhi din par tap karein.
myAttendance.tapDayHintRaise: Apne time dekhne ya correction ke liye kisi bhi din par tap karein.
myAttendance.detailNoPunches: Is din ke liye koi check in ya check out record nahi hai.
myAttendance.subtitle: Aapka mahine ka hajiri record
myAttendance.empty: Is mahine ke liye abhi tak koi hajiri record nahi hui.
myAttendance.notCheckedIn: Aapne aaj check in nahi kiya hai.
myAttendance.myRequestsEmpty: Aapne abhi tak koi correction request nahi ki hai.
myAttendance.cancelRequestConfirm: Is sudhaar request ko cancel karein?
myAttendance.raiseCorrectionHint: Hajiri sudhaar ki request karne ke liye kisi bhi purane din par tap karein.

grid.title: Hajiri muster
grid.subtitle: Mahine ki ek najar me hajiri grid - har member, har din.
grid.loadError: Hajiri muster load nahi ho saka.
grid.emptySub: Is khoj se koi member match nahi hota.

livePresence.title: Live hajiri
livePresence.subtitle: Aaj ki hajiri - kaun andar hai, kaun bahar hai, kisne abhi punch karna baki hai.
livePresence.loadError: Live presence load nahi ho saki.
livePresence.emptySub: Is view se koi member match nahi karta.

absencePatterns.title: Gair-hajiri ke pattern
absencePatterns.subtitle: Aadat wali gair-hajiri dhundhne ke liye Bradford-style scoring aur weekday clustering.
absencePatterns.loadError: Gair-hajiri ke pattern load nahi ho sake.
absencePatterns.advisoryNote: Sirf salah ke liye. Ye review ke liye gair-hajiri ke pattern dikhata hai aur pay ya hajiri status kabhi nahi badalta.
absencePatterns.emptyTitle: Is samay-avadhi me koi gair-hajiri nahi
absencePatterns.emptySub: Chune gaye pichhle period me koi member absent mark nahi hua. Lamba window try karein.

bands.title: Bradford bands
bands.tooltipTitle: Bradford Factor bands ke baare me
bands.tooltipBody1: Bradford Factor = spells² × gair-hajir din. Bands UK-origin HR practice me use hone wale salah ke threshold hain.
bands.tooltipBody2: Ye bands ManekHR me kabhi apne aap koi action shuru nahi karte. Inhe disciplinary trigger ki tarah nahi, balki manager baat-cheet ke sanket ki tarah use karein.

table.title: Dhyan rakhne wale pattern
table.searchEmptySub: Is search se koi member match nahi karta.
table.colSpellsTooltip: Spell gair-hajiri ke lagataar din ka block hai. Jaise, Som–Budh gair-hajir = 3 din ka 1 spell.
table.colBradfordTooltipBody1: Bradford Factor = spells² × gair-hajir din. Ye baar-baar ki chhoti gair-hajiri ko lambi se zyada penalty deta hai, is theory par ki anpredictable gair-hajiri kaam ko zyada disturb karti hai.
table.colBradfordTooltipBody2: Mool roop se UK HR methodology, Bradford ko ManekHR me sirf salah ke sanket ki tarah use kiya jaata hai. Ye salary, chhutti balance ya hajiri sthiti nahi badalta.
table.colBradfordTooltipBody3: Industry bands: Kam < 50, Madhyam 50–124, Zyada 125–399, Bahut zyada 400+.

chart.weekdayAriaLabel: Weekday ke hisaab se gair-hajiri bar chart

compliance.title: Hajiri compliance
compliance.subtitle: Mahine ke liye defaulter, late aane wale aur gair-hajiri ke leaderboard.
compliance.loadError: Compliance report load nahi ho saki.
compliance.thresholdHint: Is hajiri rate se niche wale members defaulter ke roop me flag hote hain.
compliance.thresholdInfoBody1: Jin members ki is mahine ki hajiri rate is threshold se niche hai, ve niche diye Defaulters table me dikhaye gaye hain. Unhe "Threshold se niche" tile me bhi gina jata hai.
compliance.thresholdInfoBody2: Ye threshold har workspace ke liye save hota hai aur sabhi managers ke beech share hota hai. Jo manager ise badalta hai wo sabke liye value update kar deta hai.
compliance.thresholdInfoBody3: Koi notification ya escalation apne aap shuru nahi hota. Members se khud follow-up karne ke liye is list ka upayog karein.
compliance.thresholdReadOnlyHint: Sirf padhne ke liye. Sirf workspace owner ya admin yeh threshold badal sakte hain.
compliance.thresholdSaveError: Threshold save nahi ho saka. Kripya phir se koshish karein.

defaulters.title: Hajiri defaulter
defaulters.emptySub: Har member {threshold}% threshold par ya usse upar hai.
defaulters.searchEmptySub: Is search se koi member match nahi karta.

lateBoard.title: Sabse zyada late aane wale
lateBoard.empty: Is mahine koi late nahi aaya.

defaulterAlerts.title: Defaulter alert
defaulterAlerts.subtitle: Threshold se neeche gaye members ka mahine ke ant mein summary email bhejo.
defaulterAlerts.saved: Defaulter alert settings save ho gayi
defaulterAlerts.saveError: Save nahi hua. Dobara try karo.
defaulterAlerts.readOnlyHint: Sirf workspace owner ya admins yeh badal sakte hain.

overtimeAnalytics.title: Overtime Analytics
overtimeAnalytics.subtitle: Is mahine kiya gaya overtime, member, shift aur din ke hisab se baata gaya.
overtimeAnalytics.loadError: Overtime analytics load nahi ho saka.
overtimeAnalytics.notExplainer: Yahan overtime sirf dekhne ke liye mapa jata hai. Ye kabhi apne aap payroll me nahi judta. Overtime manual salary adjustment se pay karein.
overtimeAnalytics.emptyTitle: Is mahine koi overtime record nahi hua
overtimeAnalytics.emptySub: Overtime ke taur par kuch log nahi hua. Overtime tabhi mapa jata hai jab hajiri policy me overtime chalu ho. Tracking shuru karne ke liye kisi policy me ise chalu karein.

kpi.peakDayHint: Ek hi din ka sabse zyada overtime

overtimeAnalytics.groupEmpty: Break down karne ke liye koi overtime nahi.

cost.title: Anumanit overtime kharch
cost.hint: Overtime cost ka andaza lagane ke liye upar per ghanta rate daalein.
cost.disclaimer: Sirf andaza, aapke set kiye rate par. Overtime apne aap payroll me nahi judta - iska upyog planning ke liye karein, dene wali rakam ke taur par nahi.
cost.disclaimerShort: Sirf andaza - member ke vetan me lagu nahi hota.
cost.rateTooltip: Prati ghanta overtime vetan dar daalein. Ye sirf what-if kharch andaze ke liye istemal hota hai aur payroll me kabhi apne aap lagu nahi hota.

table.title: Member ke hisab se overtime
table.emptySub: Is search se koi member match nahi hota.

policiesSettings.title: Hajiri Policies

Anomalies kabhi hajiri sthiti apne aap nahi badalti - ye sirf manager review ke liye salah ke flag hain.

regularizationsList.headerExplainerBody: Regularization hajiri record me baad me sudhaar ke liye bhartiya payroll shabd hai - aam taur par jab karigar punch in/out karna bhool jaata hai ya biometric device punch chook jaata hai. Karigar request uthate hain; set ki gayi manjur karne wali chain faisla karti hai.

regularizationSettings.title: Regularization settings
regularizationSettings.subtitle: Apne workspace ke liye hajiri correction requests kaise kaam karti hain ye set karein.

form.maxAttachments: Har request ke liye jyada se jyada file attachment

tooltips.approvalLevels: Correction request lagu hone se pahle kitne manager ko manjur karna hoga. 1 ka matlab sirf seedha manager manjur karta hai. 2 ya 3 reporting chain me upar ke additional level jodte hain.
tooltips.maxDaysBack: Karmchari sirf itne din pehle tak ki hajiri ke liye correction request utha sakte hain. Jaise, 30 matlab wo sirf pichhle 30 din ki hajiri sahi kar sakte hain.
tooltips.fallbackApprover: Jab karmchari ka reporting manager set na ho ya manjuri chain hal na ho sake, tab yeh vyakti approver ke roop me kaam karta hai. Sujhav: ise HR admin par set karein.
tooltips.maxAttachments: Karmchari correction request ke saath kitni supporting file (photo, document) attach kar sakta hai. Request ke liye file upload band karne ke liye 0 set karein.

alerts.saved: Regularization settings safaltapurvak save ho gayi.

anomalies.headerExplainerBody: Anomaly ek sandehajanak attendance ghatna hai jise admin review ki zarurat hai - udaaharan: anjaan device se punch (unknown_sn), seconds mein rapid duplicate punch (rapid_dup), assigned shift window ke bahar check-in (off_shift_punch), clock drift darshane wale backdated punch (time_travel), ya 3+ lagaataar missed-check-in streaks (missed_streak). Neeche diye detection rules workspace ke liye toggle kiye ja sakte hain.

checkout.subtitle: Apna plan confirm karein, kaise pay karna hai chunein, aur payment poora karein. Aap kabhi bhi badal ya cancel kar sakte hain.
checkout.notFoundBody: Aap jis plan ko subscribe karna chahte the wah humein nahi mila. Ho sakta hai wah badal gaya ho ya hata diya gaya ho. Ek chunne ke liye current plans dekhein.
checkout.bothBillSame: Dono 0% interest, saalana mein upfront discount se bachat
checkout.payYearlyHint: Poore saal ke liye ek payment.
checkout.payMonthlySub: {months} mahine ke liye {amount}/mahina · pehla charge aaj
checkout.autoRenewNote: {date} ko {amount}/saal par apne-aap renew hota hai. Renew se pehle kabhi bhi apni account settings se cancel karein.
checkout.autoRenewNoteMonthly: {date} ko {yearTotal}/saal ({amount}/mahina) par renew hota hai. Renew se pehle kabhi bhi apni account settings se cancel karein.
checkout.notChargedYet: Jab tak aap agli screen par confirm nahi karte, aapse charge nahi liya jayega.
checkout.cardPreviewNote: Jab aap aage badhenge to surakshit payment khulega, Razorpay dwara sanchalit.
checkout.billingDetailsToggle: Input tax credit ke liye GSTIN jodein (vaikalpik)
checkout.couponGated: Online payments live hone par coupons active honge.
checkout.paySuccess: Payment safal. Aap ab {plan} plan par hain.
checkout.payError: Payment puri nahi ho saki. Kripya dobara prayas karein.
checkout.comingSoonInline: Online payments jald aa rahe hain - plan badalne ke liye apne admin se sampark karein.

plansEditor.trialDurationHelp: Is plan par naye sign-up ko milne wale full-access free trial ke din. 0 = koi trial nahi.
plansEditor.isDefaultLabel: Naye sign-up ke liye default plan
plansEditor.isDefaultHelp: Chalu hone par, naye users ko apne-aap yeh plan assign hota hai. Is product ke liye pichla default apne-aap hata diya jata hai.
plansEditor.isTrialPlanHelp: Naye sign-ups trial period ke liye is plan ki access par shuru hote hain, phir default plan par aa jate hain. Is plan ke modules aur limits tay karte hain ki trial me kya khulta hai; yeh kharidne layak plan ke roop me nahi dikhega.
plansEditor.defaultTagTooltip: Naye sign-up ko apne-aap yeh plan assign hota hai.
plansEditor.upfrontDiscountHelp: Saalana keemat ek hi upfront payment me bharne par % chhut. 0 = koi chhut nahi.
plansEditor.installmentsEnabledHelp: Grahako ko saalana keemat 0%-byaj ki maasik kishto me bharne do.
plansEditor.installmentMonthsHelp: Saalana keemat ko kitni maasik kishto me bata jaye (aam taur par 12).
plansEditor.gstEnabledHelp: Chalu hone par, is plan me GST joda jata hai aur checkout par dikhaya jata hai. GST-mukt ya kar-mukt keemat ke liye band karein.
plansEditor.gstRateHelp: Is plan par laagu GST pratishat (aam taur par 18). GST band hone par andekha kiya jata hai.
plansEditor.gstInclusiveHelp: Chalu hone par, plan ki keemat me GST pehle se shaamil hai (checkout par alag kiya jata hai). Band hone par, GST upar joda jata hai.
plansEditor.cardContentHint: Pricing card par dikhaya jata hai. Koi bhi field khali chhodne par default text use hoga.

moduleAvailability.description: Locked module par customer ko kya dikhe yeh chunein: 'Coming Soon' notice (module abhi bana nahi hai) ya plan-upgrade prompt (ooche plan mein milta hai). Yeh sirf message badalta hai - kuch unlock nahi hota.

trialBanner.enabledLabel: Plan pages par trial banner dikhayein
trialBanner.enabledHelp: In-app aur public pricing pages par '45-din ka free trial' promo banner chalu/band karta hai.
trialBanner.headlineHelp: Default localized message use karne ke liye khali chhodein. Trial ki lambai ke liye '{days}' use karein.
trialBanner.headlinePlaceholder: jaise Aaj hi apna '{days}'-din ka free trial shuru karein
trialBanner.saved: Trial banner settings save ho gayi

platform.platformRestrictedDesc: Yeh suvidha {platform} platform par uplabdh nahi hai. Is content ko dekhne ke liye kripya {availablePlatforms} ka upyog karein.

sessions.sessionLimitDesc: Aap {platform} session ki maximum sankhya ({limit}) tak pahunch gaye hain. Continue karne ke liye kripya ek session band karein.

invite.accepting: Aapka invite accept kar rahe hain…
invite.invitedDesc: Is invite ko accept karne aur workspace me join karne ke liye sign in karein ya account banayein.
invite.joinedWorkspace: Aap safaltapoorvak {name} me shamil ho gaye hain.
invite.inviteAccepted: Aapka invite safaltapoorvak accept ho gaya hai.
invite.expiredOrUsed: Ye invite link shayad expire ho gaya ho ya pehle se use ho chuka ho.
invite.invalidToken: Invalid invite link - koi token nahi mila.

attendanceStatutory.title: Statutory exports
attendanceStatutory.subtitle: Bharatiya shram-kanoon filing ke liye kanooni-anupalan PDF aur Excel register download karein.

templates.mh_form_t: MH Form T (Shops & Establishments Muster Roll + Wages)
templates.gj_form_d: GJ Form D (Gujarat S&E Act 2019 - Attendance Register)

tooltips.dateRange: Report ke liye shuru aur ant ki tareekh chunein. Adhiktam range 366 din hai. Bhavishya ki tareekhein manya nahi hain.
tooltips.members: Is report me shamil karne ke liye khaas karmchari chunein. Sabhi active members shamil karne ke liye khaali rakhein.
tooltips.customDailyRate: Is OT register me sabhi karmchariyon ke liye istemaal karne ek saman dainik rate daalein. Khaali rakhne par, har karmchari ka dainik rate unke salary se calculate hota hai.

alerts.noHistory: Demand par generate hota hai. Koi Export history store nahi hoti - har request ek nayi file banati hai.

attendanceStatutory.headerExplainerBody: Statutory exports Bharatiya labour-law filings ke liye zaruri pre-formatted registers hain - Muster Roll (Shops & Establishments Act ke tahat Form T), ESI contribution challan, PF / EPFO returns, aur aise hi. Columns + rounding + signature blocks inspector-facing format se match karte hain taaki aap seedha print karke file kar sakein. State-specific templates niche listed hain.

pnl.title: Profit & Loss (Direct margin)
pnl.disclaimer: Direct margin: revenue minus bechi gayi maal ki cost. Overhead, freight, dalali aur salary allocation shamil nahi.

settings.title: Party intelligence
settings.greetingsToggle: Birthday aur anniversary ki shubhkamnaayein bhejein

warnings.blacklistedParty: Party blacklisted hai: {reason}. Aap abhi bhi continue kar sakte hain, par risk dhyan me rakhein.

tab.title: Production Logs
tab.subhead: Is machine ka dainik output. Shift ke agle din tak edit kar sakte hain.

empty.heading: Abhi koi production log nahi
empty.body: Production history banana shuru karne ke liye is machine ka pehla output log karein.

filteredEmpty.heading: In filters se koi log match nahi karta
filteredEmpty.body: Wider date range try karein ya filters clear karein.

lockTooltip.window: Edit window band - shift ke agle din logs lock ho jate hain.
lockTooltip.payroll: {monthYear} ka payroll lock hai. Edit karne ke liye FY dobara kholein.

pagination.summary: {total} logs me se {from}-{to} dikha rahe hain

fields.dateHint: Aaj ki tareekh default rahegi. Edit window me aur payroll lock se pehle backdated log allowed hain.
fields.operatorAutoResolved: Aaj ki assignment se apne aap select hua
fields.primaryMetricRequired: Is machine type ke liye {metric} zaruri hai.
fields.secondaryGroupHint: Agar is shift me aapne extra reading track ki ho to capture karein.
fields.notesPlaceholder: Vaikalpik context - design number, customer, quality flag…

delete.confirmBody: {date} ko {operatorName} ke liye {logCode} soft-delete hoga. Aap edit window me ise restore kar sakte hain.

error.generic: Log save nahi hua. Dobara koshish karein ya apna connection check karein.

bulk.title: Bulk production entry
bulk.subhead: Ek hi form me shift par ki har machine ka output log karein. Jo row validation me viphal ho jaye wo retry ke liye editable rehti hai.
bulk.step1Hint: Is tareekh par jin machines tak aapki access hai wo hum auto-load kar denge.
bulk.step2Title: Har machine ke hisaab se output daalein
bulk.step2Hint: Aapke scope me {n} machines dikha rahe hain. Submit par khali rows skip ho jati hain.

empty.heading: Is shift ke liye koi machine assign nahi hai
empty.body: Is tareekh ke liye ya to koi shift assignment nahi hai, ya koi aapke scope me nahi hai. Doosri tareekh chunein ya apne admin se sampark karein.

errTip.WINDOW: Is tareekh ke liye edit window band ho gaya hai.
errTip.SCOPE: Ye machine aapke scope ke bahar hai.
errTip.LOCKED: Is mahine ka payroll lock hai.
errTip.AMBIGUOUS: Ek se zyada active operator - saaf taur par ek chunein.

footer.noneFilled: Submit karne ke liye kam se kam ek row bharein.

discard.title: Daali gayi sabhi values discard karein?
discard.body: Ye har row saaf kar deta hai. Aap dobara load karke naye sire se shuru kar sakte hain.

toast.allFailed: Koi log save nahi hua. Row ke errors check karke dobara try karein.

warn.editWindow: Yeh tareekh kuch log ke liye edit window ke bahar hai. Affected rows 'WINDOW' ke saath fail hongi.

error.payrollLocked: {monthYear} ke liye Payroll lock hai. Kisi open month me tareekh chunein.

gate.heading: Production tracking aapke plan me nahi hai
gate.body: Daily output log karein, piece-rate payroll chalayein aur production dashboards dekhein. Apne workspace ke liye Production chalu karne ke liye upgrade karein.

errors.editWindowExpired: Is tareekh ke liye edit window band ho gayi hai - shift ke agle din logs lock ho jaate hain.
errors.payrollLocked: {monthYear} ke liye payroll lock hai. Badlav ke liye FY dobara kholein.
errors.outOfScope: Yeh machine aapke scope me nahi hai.
errors.assignmentAmbiguous: Is machine par ek se zyada active operator hain - kripya ek chunein.
errors.assignmentMissing: Is tareekh par is operator ke liye koi active assignment nahi hai.
errors.primaryMetricRequired: {metric} ki value daalein - is machine type ke liye zaruri hai.
errors.bulkLimit: Aap ek baar me zyada se zyada 50 logs submit kar sakte hain. Chhote batches me baant lein.
errors.serverGeneric: Hamari taraf kuch galat ho gaya. Ek minute baad phir se try karein.
errors.network: Aap offline lag rahe hain. Dobara connect hokar try karein.
errors.forbidden: Aapke paas production log karne ki permission nahi hai. Apne admin se sampark karein.

empty.heading: Koi downtime log nahi hua
empty.body: Jab yah machine ruke tab yahan log karein taki production report sahi rahe.

fields.endAt: Ant (abhi bhi chalu ho to khali rakhein)

addModal.title: Kaaran code add karein
addModal.categoryHint: Mechanical → machine maintenance ke roop me dikhta hai. Operational → machine idle ke roop me dikhta hai.

lockedHints.system: System kaaran ka naam badla ya disable kiya ja sakta hai, par delete nahi.
lockedHints.key: Key ek sthir identifier hai - banane ke baad ise badla nahi ja sakta.

toast.saved: Downtime kaaran catalogue update ho gaya
toast.addError: Kaaran add nahi ho saka - kripya label check karein.

errors.editWindowExpired: 7 din se purana downtime edit nahi kiya ja sakta.
errors.payrollLocked: Is mahine ka payroll lock hai. Is mahine me downtime edit karne ke liye FY dobara kholein.
errors.machineRetired: Yeh machine retire hai aur nayi downtime entry sweekar nahi kar sakti.
errors.reasonNotFound: Workspace catalogue me reason code nahi mila.

dashboard.empty: Lead-time window me koi maintenance due nahi.

errors.MAINTENANCE_LEAD_TIME_OUT_OF_RANGE: Lead-time 1 aur 30 din ke beech hona chahiye.

compliance.warn12Month: Salaah: vasuli yojana 12 mahine ki salahkar avadhi se zyada hai. Kist badhane par vichar karein.

compliance.overrideBreachMinWage: {month}: {proposed} net pay ko nyuntam vetan se neeche le jaata hai. {max} tak ghataaya.

salaryCalculation.calcBodyHourlyNoAttendance: Anumanit salary ghante ka rate x roz ke ghante x {basisLabel} use karti hai.

switchModal.toHourlyTitle: Ghante ke hisab se salary par switch karein?
switchModal.toHourlyContent: Isse karmchari masik salary se samay-aadharit ghanta pay par chala jayega. Koi bhi CTC, salary structure aur component override setup hata diya jayega.
switchModal.toMonthlyContent: Isse karmchari samay-aadharit ghanta pay se masik salary par chala jayega. Koi bhi ghanta rate, dainik-ghante aur override setup hata diya jayega.

overview.pageSubtitle: Aapke workspace ke liye payroll health, settlement status aur period navigation

overview.kpiOutstandingAdvancesSub: Workspace mein sabhi members ka total
overview.kpiOutstandingAdvancesInfo: Advance ek chota, bina-byaaz ka amount hai jo member ko payday se pehle diya jaata hai. Yeh aage ki salary se thoda-thoda wapas kaat liya jaata hai. Yeh total dikhata hai ki abhi kitna recover karna baaki hai. [Native review zaruri]
overview.kpiActiveLoansSub: {count, plural, one {# loan} other {# loans}} - {principal} baaki principal
overview.kpiActiveLoansInfo: Loan ek bada amount hota hai jisme EMI plan ho sakta hai. Advance se zyada samay tak chal sakta hai. Yeh total sabhi active aur paused loans ka baaki principal dikhata hai. [Native review zaruri]
overview.kpiBonusCommissionInfo: Ye salary ke upar extra payment hai. Ise wapas nahi liya jaata. Payment ke saath add ki gayi commission bhi is total mein shamil hai, double-count nahi hota. [Native review zaruri]

payments.pageSubtitle: Paise ki movement dekhein, advances trace karein, aur period ke hisab se payroll payments reconcile karein.

settings.pageTitle: Payroll ke niyam aur defaults configure karein
settings.pageDescription: Payroll setup chunein, jaruri workflows enable karein, aur workspace defaults define karein jo module me salary kaise chalti hai ye tay karte hain.
settings.accessWarning: Payroll settings badalne ke liye aapko admin ya malik access zaruri hai.

presets.heading: Payroll setup chunein
presets.description: Preset se shuru karein, phir toggles fine-tune karein taaki salary module aapka business asal me payroll kaise chalata hai uske sath match kare.
presets.customWarning: Feature controls ab kisi preset se match nahi karte. Customize jari rakhein ya unhe reset karne ke liye dobara preset apply karein.
presets.confirmContent: Ye sabhi feature toggles ko {label} defaults par reset kar dega.

features.heading: Jaruri payroll features enable karein
features.description: Ye workspace toggles tay karte hain ki payroll, payment aur export me kaun se salary workflows dikhte hain.

defaults.heading: Apne workspace payroll defaults set karein
defaults.description: Ye defaults salary formatting, fixed-day salary seeds, hajiri payroll behavior aur module me payroll timing tay karte hain.
defaults.workingDaysHint: Jab salary setup fixed month days use kare to default fixed-day basis ke roop me istemal hota hai.
defaults.attendanceDefaultHint: Workspace default hajiri behavior use karne wale karmchari is niyam ka palan karenge.
defaults.attendanceDisabledAlertDescription: Jab tak upar ye feature enable nahi hota, ye workspace salary calculation me hajiri ko ignore karega. Save ki gayi karmchari hajiri preferences tab tak dormant rahengi.
defaults.seedAlert: Workspace defaults naye salary setups ko seed karte hain
defaults.seedAlertDescription: In defaults ko badalne se wo karmchari nahi badalte jinke paas pehle se apna salary day-basis ya hajiri behavior save hai.
defaults.saveHint: Defaults sath me save hote hain taaki karmchari aur naye salary setups aligned rahein.
defaults.saveError: Payroll defaults save karne me viphal
defaults.unsavedBannerDescription: Workspace ke liye formatting, hajiri defaults aur fixed-day payroll seeds save karein.

statutory.heading: Statutory Deductions Setup
statutory.description: Apne workspace ke liye PF, ESI, PT, TDS aur LWF statutory deduction rules configure karein.
statutory.saveError: Statutory settings save karne me viphal

pf.enableHint: Eligible karmchariyon ke liye employee PF deduction generation on karein.
pf.wageCeilingHint: Statutory ceiling Rs.15,000 hai. Contributions min(basic, ceiling) par calculate hote hain.

esi.enableHint: Eligible karmchariyon ke liye employee ESI deduction generation on karein.
esi.grossThresholdHint: Jin karmchariyon ka gross is amount ke barabar ya kam hai wo ESI applicable hain. Statutory limit Rs.21,000 hai.

pt.enableHint: Selected gross salary slab ke aadhar par Professional Tax deductions apply karein.
pt.stateHint: Jahan aapke karmchari employed hain wo state chunein. Is state ke PT slabs apne aap apply honge.
pt.customSlabsLabel: Platform defaults ke bajay custom PT slabs use karein
pt.customSlabsHint: Sirf is workspace ke liye shared admin slab table ko override karein.
pt.customSlabsDescription: Is workspace ke liye gross-salary slabs aur PT amount define karein.
pt.ratesNote: Chune gaye state ke liye gross salary slab ke aadhar par PT har mahine kata jata hai.

tds.enableHint: TDS har mahine projected annual income, tax regime aur investment declaration ke aadhar par calculate hota hai.
tds.projectionBody: Run Payroll page se har karmchari ke liye declaration daalein. Engine projected annual income, chuni gayi tax regime aur saved declaration values ka upyog karke masik TDS deduction apne aap post karta hai.
tds.scopeNote: Sirf full-time aur part-time karmchariyon par lagu. Contract/consultant TDS (194C) yahan handle nahi hota.

lwf.enableHint: Har karmchari ke employment state ke aadhar par LWF apne aap June aur December me (ya West Bengal ke liye sirf December me) kata jata hai.
lwf.ratesNote: Har karmchari ke employment state ke aadhar par LWF apne aap June aur December me (ya West Bengal ke liye sirf December me) kata jata hai.
lwf.ratesTableTitle: State ke hisab se LWF rates
lwf.fallbackStateNote: Jin karmchariyon ka state set nahi hai ve apne LWF state ke roop me workspace PT state (abhi: {state}) use karenge.
lwf.saveError: LWF settings save karne me viphal
lwf.ratesFootnote: Rates state law dwara fix hote hain. Karmchari ka state team member profile me set hota hai (Work tab se Statutory and Tax).

disbursement.heading: Bhugtan aur Upasthiti Niyam
disbursement.description: Vetan kab diya ja sakta hai, niyamitikaran window, vetan-haani posting, aur chutti/saptahik-off upasthiti ganana ko kaise prabhavit karte hain yah configure karen.

templates.heading: Dobara use hone wale CTC breakdown define karein
templates.description: CTC aadharit karmchariyon ke liye dobara use hone wale salary structure banayein. Default template apne aap chun jata hai jab aap aise karmchari ke liye salary set karte hain jiske paas pehle se saved template na ho.
templates.deleteConfirmDescription: Ise use karne wale karmchari par asar nahi hoga, par unhe ise dobara assign nahi kiya ja sakta.
templates.emptyDescription: Abhi koi salary structure template nahi hai. Upar ka Quick Setup use karein ya custom template banayein.

compliance.heading: Advance Recovery Anupalana
compliance.description: Salary advance recovery ke liye nyuntam ujri aur kataut seema niyam set karen.
compliance.minWageHint: Agar set nahi kiya hai to khali chhodein. Set karne par advance recovery take-home is se kam nahi karega.
compliance.wageCategoryHint: Apne sandarbh ke liye. Is workspace ke liye laagu nyuntam ujri anusuchi se milata hai.
compliance.deductionCap75Tooltip: 75% seema tabhi laagu hoti hai jab workspace mein Ujri Bhugatan Adhiniyam s.7(3) ke antargat sahkari samiti kataut ho. Yah vikalp chunne se pahle apne shram kanun salahkar se salah len.
compliance.advisoryOneThirdLabel: Kist ujri ke 1/3 se adhik hone par salah chetavni dikhaaen
compliance.advisoryOneThirdHint: Sirf salah - plan nahi rokti. Ujri Bhugatan Adhiniyam s.12A margdarshan par adharit.
compliance.legalNote: Ye seemaen Ujri Bhugatan Adhiniyam 1936 aur 2019 ki Wage Sanhita par adharit hain. Kataut seema badlane se pahle apne shram kanun salahkar se salah len.
compliance.saveError: Anupalana settings save karne mein vifalata

nav.alreadyCurrentMonth: Pehle se hi current mahina hai

export.upgradeTooltip: Export unlock karne ke liye upgrade karein

empty.noTeamBody: Payroll manage karne ke liye pehle apni team add karein.

shiftEmpty.title: Maujooda filter se koi shift group match nahi karta
shiftEmpty.body: Payroll ko dobara shift ke hisab se dekhne ke liye search ya sthiti filter saaf karein.

shiftRows.loading: Shift karmchari load ho rahe hain...
shiftRows.noMatchInShift: Is shift me koi matching karmchari nahi.
