shiftRows.noMatchTitle: In filter ke liye yeh shift saaf hai
shiftRows.noMatchBody: Is shift me payroll rows dekhne ke liye doosri sthiti ya search aazmayein.

adjustmentDrawer.title: Salary adjustments - {name}

paymentSettlement.heading: Payment settlement
paymentSettlement.notPayingInFull: Puri payment nahi kar rahe? Deduction (write-off, withholding, vagairah) se balance band karein.
paymentSettlement.overpaidDeductionInfo: Yeh salary puri paid hone ke baad deduction lagu hui. Zyada paid amount karmchari se recover karni hai.
paymentSettlement.overpaidAdvanceInfo: Payments current net salary payable se zyada hain. Excess amount advance ke roop me record hua.
paymentSettlement.balanceInfo: Active salary adjustments lagu karne ke baad abhi bhi payable yeh amount hai.

adjustmentDrawer.paymentLedgerNote: Salary adjustments payroll computation badalte hain. Payment records alag rehte hain aur Payment Ledger me hi rehte hain.
adjustmentDrawer.notGeneratedNote: Is karmchari ke liye selected mahine ka payroll abhi generate nahi hua. Aap pehla adjustment save karenge tab hum use apne aap generate kar denge.

composer.heading: Adjustment add karein
composer.description: Mahine-aadharit salary addition ya deduction record post karein. Posted amount reverse aur re-entry se theek hota hai.
composer.lockedMessage: Yeh salary record locked hai. Aap history dekh sakte hain, lekin adjustment add ya reverse karne se pehle ise unlock karein.
composer.correctionDraftDescription: Yeh nayi entry reversed adjustment "{title}" se judegi. Niche ke fields check karein, phir corrected posting ko naye record ki tarah save karein.
composer.notePlaceholder: Payroll record ke liye vaikalpik vivran

history.heading: Adjustment history
history.description: Is salary mahine ke liye active aur reversed entries.
history.emptyBody: Is mahine ke additions aur deductions yahan dikhenge.
history.badgePaymentLinkedTooltip: Payment record hone par apne aap banta hai (jaise commission, zyada payout). Undo karne ke liye linked payment reverse karein.
history.badgeSystemTooltip: System dwara apne aap banta hai (jaise advance recovery). Undo karne ke liye source advance payment reverse karein.
history.menuReverseDisabledTooltip: Payment ya system action dwara apne aap banta hai. Ise undo karne ke liye linked payment reverse karein.
history.menuDuplicate: Correction ke roop me duplicate karein
history.correctionLinked: Reversed adjustment "{title}" se linked correction entry.

commission.pageSubtitle: Team ke liye commission aur incentive bhugtan track karo
commission.loadError: Commission data load nahi hua. Dobara koshish karo.
commission.singleLedgerDesc: Yahan sabhi commission aur incentive rakam ek hi khate mein hain. Payment modal aur bulk import donon se jode gaye commission sahit - kabhi double ginti nahi.
commission.infoTooltip: Commission wo performance pay hai jo salary ke upar milti hai. Yeh baad mein wapas nahi li jaati. TDS lagta hai. PF aur ESI mein shamil nahi. Yahan ke totalon mein payment modal se joda gaya commission bhi shamil hai - double ginti nahi. Incentive bhi wahi hai lekin non-sales performance ke liye.
commission.statActiveSchedulesHint: Abhi chal rahe recurring commission schedule
commission.statTotalEntriesHint: Moojuda filter mein darjon ki sankhya
commission.emptyEntries: Chuney gaye filter ke liye koi commission darj nahi mila.
commission.pfEsiTooltip: Commission aur incentive PF aur ESI mein shamil nahi hain. TDS saamaanya taur par lagta hai.
commission.drawerSubtitle: Ek ya zyada team sadasyom ke liye diye gaye samay ke liye commission ya incentive darj karo.
commission.recordError: Commission darj nahi ho saka. Dobara koshish karo.
commission.recordValidationEmpty: Submit karne se pahle kam se kam ek valid darj joden.
commission.csvFormatDesc: Ek line = ek darj. Column (header vaikalpik):
commission.csvNoValidRows: Koi valid pankti nahi. Galtiyaan sudharen.
commission.scheduleError: Schedule update nahi ho saka. Dobara koshish karo.
commission.deleteConfirmDesc: Yeh schedule poora maana jaayega. Bhavishya mein auto-disbursement nahi chalega. Abhi tak ke darj prabhavit nahi honge.
commission.disburseDrawerDesc: Ek khaas samayavadhi ke liye commission bhugtan trigger karo. Yeh salary samayojan jodta hai. Usi period ke liye dobara submit karna safe hai.
commission.disburseAlreadyDone: Is samayavadhi ke liye commission pahle hi bhugtan ho chuka hai.
commission.disburseError: Bhugtan nahi ho saka. Dobara koshish karo.
commission.ytdEmpty: Is vittiya saal ke liye koi commission/incentive darj nahi mila.

bonus.pageSubtitle: Team ke liye statutory bonus aur festival bonus
bonus.loadError: Bonus data load nahi hua. Dobara koshish karo.
bonus.infoTooltip: Statutory Bonus kanun ke anusaar zaroori hai (Payment of Bonus Act). Rs 21,000/month tak kamaane waale employees eligible hain. Minimum 8.33%, maximum 20%. 30 November tak dena hai. Festival Bonus aapki apni marzi hai. Dono TDS-taxable, PF-excluded. Ek hi ledger - no double count.
bonus.singleLedgerTitle: Ek hi ledger - double count nahi
bonus.singleLedgerDesc: Statutory bonus, festival bonus aur adjustment form se joda gaya bonus - sab ek hi ledger mein record hote hain.
bonus.statTotalHint: Sabhi prakar ke bonus, ek ledger
bonus.statRunsHint: Is financial year bonus run ki sankhya
bonus.eligibilityDesc: Rs 21,000/month tak. Calculation base Rs 7,000 ya minimum wage. 30 working days zaroori. 8.33% minimum, 20% maximum. 30 November tak. PF-excluded. TDS lagta hai.
bonus.percentTooltip: 8.33% (kanuni minimum) aur 20% (kanuni maximum) ke beech percentage likho. CA se confirm karo.
bonus.previewHint: Financial year aur percentage chunein, phir Preview click karein.
bonus.previewError: Preview nahi hua. Inputs check karo.
bonus.runError: Bonus run nahi hua. Dobara koshish karo.
bonus.runIdempotentDesc: Is financial year pehle diye gaye members automatically skip hote hain. Double payment nahi hoti.
bonus.lastWageTooltip: Is financial year ka sabse recent base salary. Rs 21,000 ceiling ke against check hota hai.
bonus.calcWageTooltip: Bonus calculate karne ke liye vetan. Rs 7,000 ya minimum wage, jo zyada ho. Actual salary nahi.
bonus.festivalCreditTooltip: Agar is FY mein countsAsStatutory=true ke saath festival bonus hai, to sirf shortfall post hota hai.
bonus.emptyPreview: Is financial year koi member nahi mila.
bonus.festivalInfoDesc: Festival bonus bilkul aapki marzi. TDS lagta hai, PF-excluded. ESI treatment Case Law pe depend karta hai - compliance team se confirm karo.
bonus.festivalEsiDesc: Festival/discretionary bonus ke liye ESI treatment Case Law mein vivadast hai. Compliance team se confirm karo.
bonus.countsAsStatutoryLabel: Yeh festival bonus is financial year ka statutory bonus bhi maano
bonus.countsAsStatutoryTooltip: Tick: yeh festival bonus member ki statutory zaroori poori karega. Statutory run sirf shortfall dega. Double obligation talega.
bonus.countsAsStatutoryNote: Statutory run festival credit ganak ke sirf shortfall dega.
bonus.festivalSuccess: {count} festival bonus {count, plural, one {entry} other {entries}} record hua.
bonus.festivalError: Festival bonus record nahi hua. Dobara koshish karo.
bonus.emptyEntries: Kam se kam ek entry jodo.
bonus.statutoryColTooltip: Is financial year statutory bonus diya.
bonus.emptySummary: Is financial year koi bonus entry nahi.
bonus.emptyRuns: Is financial year koi run nahi.
bonus.configCaDesc: Statutory bonus ke aankde kanun se taye hote hain. Defaults kanuni rakam hain. Koi bhi badlav CA se confirm karo.
bonus.configEligibilityCeilingTooltip: Is se zyada maasik vetan waale employees statutory bonus ke eligible nahi. Default Rs 21,000/month.
bonus.configCalcFloorTooltip: Bonus calculate karne ke liye vetan. Default Rs 7,000. State minimum wage zyada ho to override karo.
bonus.configAllocableSurplusTooltip: CA-certified allocable surplus percentage. 8.33%-20% ke beech. 0 = default 8.33%.
bonus.configClawbackTooltip: Agar employee itne mahino mein chhod de, FnF mein bonus clawback ho sakta hai. 0 = clawback nahi.
bonus.configNewEstablishmentTooltip: Pehle 5 saal Payment of Bonus Act lagu nahi hota.

erp.title: Team, attendance, salary aur roles, ek hi ERP mein.
erp.sub: ManekHR ERP aapka staff record, attendance aur salary sambhalta hai, har role ke liye sahi access ke saath. Surat ke heera polish units ke liye banaya gaya.
erp.cta: ManekHR ERP ke baare mein jaanein
erp.trialNote: Sabhi features ke saath free trial. Card ki zarurat nahi.

faq.headline: Unit owners jo sawaal poochhte hain.

free.a: Shuru karne ke liye, haan. Staff record, attendance aur salary tracking free mein try ki ja sakti hai, card ki zarurat nahi. Aapki team badhe waise paid plans aur dete hain.

setup.q: Set up karne mein kitna time lagta hai?
setup.a: Bas kuch minute. Apne phone number se sign up karein, apna unit jodein, aur staff jodna shuru karein. Koi lambi training ya onboarding ki zarurat nahi.

pricing.a: ManekHR ek simple monthly subscription hai, jo aapki team ke size par depend karta hai. Kisi bhi cheez par commission nahi hai aur koi chhupa hua charge nahi hai.

attendance.a: Attendance phone, shared kiosk, ya biometric device se darj ki ja sakti hai. Supervisors apni poori team ki attendance ek hi jagah se darj kar sakte hain.

payroll.a: Aapka staff daily-wage, monthly, ya piece-rate par ho, salary attendance se automatically calculate hoti hai. Advance aur deduction bhi usi jagah sambhale jaate hain.

languages.q: Kin bhashaon mein kaam karta hai?
languages.a: English, Gujarati, aur English akshar mein likhi Hindi ya Gujarati. Bhasha ek baar chunein aur kabhi bhi badlein.

compliance.q: Kya yeh statutory compliance sambhalta hai?
compliance.a: Haan. Payroll mein PF, ESI, PT aur TDS jaise statutory deductions support kiye jaate hain, taaki aapki payslips compliance mein rahein.

roles.q: Kya main control kar sakta hoon ki kaun kya dekhe?
roles.a: Haan. ManekHR role-based access use karta hai, taaki owners, accountants aur supervisors har koi sirf apne role se related information aur actions hi dekhte hain.

data.a: Haan. Aapka data aapka hi rehta hai, hum kabhi bechte nahi, aur attendance ya salary mein har badlaav ek saaf audit trail mein darj hota hai.

support.a: Hamari team email aur WhatsApp par pahunchi ja sakti hai, aur hum aapka unit pehle din se sahi tarike se set up karne mein madad karte hain.

switch.q: Kya main kaagaz ya sheets se switch kar sakta hoon?
switch.a: Haan. Zyaadatar units apni maujooda staff list aur attendance records jod kar shuru karte hain, aur ek hi din mein pura set up ho jaate hain.

finalCta.headline: Apni team ek hi app se chalayein.
finalCta.sub: Staff record, attendance aur salary set up karne mein kuch minute lagte hain. Shuru karna free, apni bhasha mein, aapke paas wale phone par.

erp.headline: Apna poora unit ek app se chalayein.
erp.sub: Staff record, attendance aur salary ek hi jagah. Sabhi features ke saath free trial se shuru karein. Card ki zarurat nahi.

footer.tagline: Heera polish units ke liye banaya gaya staff aur salary.
footer.trust: Aapka data aapka hi rehta hai - hum kabhi bechte nahi. Simple pricing, kisi bhi cheez par commission nahi.

hero.sub: Apna unit ManekHR ERP par chalayein. Bina card ke free me ya full-access trial par shuru karein.

erpHeading.title: Aapki team ke saath badhte plans
erpHeading.sub: Attendance, salary, aur staff management ek hi system me. Free me shuru karein aur zaroorat ke hisaab se tools jodein. Koi setup fee nahi, kabhi bhi cancel karein.

trial.title: {days} din free, full access
trial.sub: Har ERP feature {days} din ke liye free aazmayein. Koi card nahi, koi commitment nahi. Pay karne se pehle apni team set up karein aur chalte hue dekhein.
trial.b3: Upgrade karne par data bana rahe

assurances.a1: Shuru karne ke liye card ki zaroorat nahi
assurances.a2: Kabhi bhi cancel karein, koi lock-in nahi

pricing.note: Staff records aur attendance ke saath free me shuru karein. Aapki team aur zaroorat badhne par kabhi bhi upgrade karein.

trial.q: Free trial kaise kaam karta hai?
trial.a: Naye ERP workspace full-access free trial ke saath shuru hote hain. Har feature unlock, bina credit card. Khatm hone par aap sirf ek plan chunte hain aur aapka data aapke paas hi rehta hai. Trial ki lambai upar aur plan cards par dikhayi gayi hai.

whichPlan.q: Meri team ke liye kaunsa plan sahi hai?
whichPlan.a: Set up ho rahe 5 tak logon ke liye Free sahi hai. Starter chhutti aur poori haazri add karta hai, Growth poori salary aur statutory compliance add karta hai, aur Business machine, production, multi-location aur advanced reports add karta hai. Sujhaav ke liye upar ke team-size helper ka istemaal karein.

billing.a: Paid plans ek-saal ki avadhi hain. Saal ka upfront pay karein (dikhaye gaye kisi bhi upfront discount ke saath) ya 12 bina-byaaj maasik installments mein. Plans har saal apne aap renew hote hain aur har renewal se pehle hum email karte hain.

gst.a: Har plan card dikhata hai ki GST shaamil hai ya upar joda jaata hai, aur kis rate par. Aapke invoice GST-ready hain, isliye aap input credit claim kar sakte hain.

switch.q: Kya main baad mein upgrade ya downgrade kar sakta hoon?
switch.a: Haan. Jaise aapki team badhe ya zaroorat badle, kabhi bhi plan badlein. Aapka data aur history saath chalta hai.

cancel.q: Agar main cancel karoon to kya hota hai?
cancel.a: Aap bina lock-in kabhi bhi cancel kar sakte hain. Apni paid avadhi ke ant tak aapko access rehta hai, aur hamari retention policy ke anusaar aapka data uplabdh rehta hai.

free.a: Shuru karne ke liye, haan. Staff record, attendance aur salary tracking free mein try ki ja sakti hai, card ki zarurat nahi. Aapki team badhe waise paid plans aur dete hain, aur ManekHR kabhi kisi bhi cheez par commission nahi leta.

do.q: ManekHR par main kya kar sakta hoon?
do.a: Aap ek staff directory rakh sakte hain, phone, kiosk ya biometric device se attendance track kar sakte hain, sahi payroll chala sakte hain, aur role-based access se control kar sakte hain ki kaun kya dekhe ya badle.

languages.q: ManekHR kaun si bhashaayein support karta hai?
languages.a: ManekHR Gujarati, Hindi aur English me chalta hai, jisme English akshar me likhi Gujarati aur Hindi bhi shaamil hai. Aap kabhi bhi bhasha badal sakte hain.

meta.title: Shikayat aur account recovery
meta.description: Delete hone wale account ko recover karein, ya hamare grievance officer ke paas data-suraksha shikayat darj karein.

hero.title: Shikayat aur recovery.
hero.sub: Account delete karne ka irada badal gaya, ya data-suraksha ke baare mein koi sawaal hai? Humse aise sampark karein.

recover.heading: Delete kiya gaya account recover karein
recover.body: Agar aapka account delete hone wala hai, to use recover karne ke liye aapke paas 30 din hain. Us tareekh se pehle apne registered address se humein email karein aur hamari team use restore kar degi. 30 din baad delete permanent ho jaata hai aur wapas nahi laaya ja sakta.

officer.heading: Data-suraksha grievance officer
officer.sla: Hum har request ko 3 working din mein acknowledge karte hain.
officer.noEmail: App ke andar Support ya hamare Contact page ke through humse sampark karein, aur hum aapki request grievance officer tak pahunchayenge.

lockedOut.heading: Account mein lock ho gaye hain?
lockedOut.body: Humse sampark karne ke liye aapko sign in karne ki zaroorat nahi hai. Apne registered email ya phone number se humein email karein aur aapki request par kaam karne se pehle hum aapki pehchaan verify karenge.

meta.title: Contact
meta.description: ManekHR team se email ya WhatsApp par sampark karein. Hum aapko shuru karne mein madad karke khush honge.

hero.title: Humse baat karein.
hero.sub: Connect, ERP, pricing ya shuru karne ke baare mein sawaal hain? Sampark karein - ek asli insaan aapko jawab dega.

email.label: Email
email.desc: Vistaar wale sawaalon aur jo bhi aap likhit mein chahte hain, uske liye sabse achha.

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.desc: Quick sawaal aur working hours mein tez jawab.

hours.label: Support hours
hours.desc: Somvaar se Shanivaar, subah 10 baje se shaam 7 baje IST. Paid plans mein priority support shaamil hai.

form.heading: Humein message bhejein
form.messagePlaceholder: Hum kaise madad kar sakte hain?
form.helper: Ye aapka email app message taiyar karke kholega.

industry.caption: Surat ke diamond-polishing industry par ek nazar

workforce.label: Surat ke diamond-polishing units me kaam karte hain, India ke sabse bade skilled workforce me se ek.

value.label: duniya bhar me cut aur polish kiye gaye diamonds Surat ke units se guzarte hain.

hubs.label: chhota ho ya bada, register, WhatsApp group, aur spreadsheet par chalta hai, jise ManekHR ek hi system se badal deta hai.

stock.title: Stock saaransh
stock.filterGodown: Godown ke hisaab se filter karein
stock.filterCategory: Category ke hisaab se filter karein
stock.lowStockOnlyAria: Sirf kam stock ki items dikhayein
stock.trackBatchOnlyAria: Sirf batch-track ki gayi items dikhayein
stock.emptyTitle: Abhi koi stock track nahi hua
stock.emptyBody: Item master mein items jodein aur opening stock ya purchase bill darj karein taaki aapki inventory yahan dikhe.
stock.reorderTip: Reorder level wo hath mein quantity hai jahan item dobara kharidni chahiye. Is level se neeche ki items flag hoti hain taaki aap samay par kharid kar sakein.
stock.valuationTip: Stock value hath mein har item ke average cost (weighted-average tarika) se calculate hoti hai. Inventory mein bandhi working capital naapne ke liye iska upyog karein.

godowns.title: Godown
godowns.tip: Godown (warehouse) ek bhautik sthan hai jahan stock rakha jata hai. Floor, branch ya warehouse ke hisaab se track karne ke liye stock ko Godown mein baantein.
godowns.deleteConfirmDesc: Ise wapas nahi laya ja sakta.
godowns.emptyBody: Aapki firm ke liye Main Godown ban raha hai. Isme thoda samay lagta hai.
godowns.defaultHint: Aap default Godown use kar rahe hain. Sthan, floor ya warehouse ke hisaab se stock baantne ke liye aur Godown jodein.

batches.title: Batch
batches.tip: Batch ek saath bani ikaiyon ko group karta hai (aksar manufacturing aur expiry date ke saath) taaki stock batch ke hisaab se track aur recall ho sake.
batches.emptyTitle: Batch tracking F-10 mein aa raha hai
batches.emptyBody: Manufacturing voucher enable hone ke baad batch registry uplabdh hogi.

serials.title: Serial
serials.tip: Serial number ek bhautik ikai ko pehchaanta hai taaki use kharid se bikri, return ya scrap tak alag se track kiya ja sake.
serials.filterStatusAria: Status ke hisaab se filter karein
serials.emptyBody: Serial tracking enable items ke liye jab aap purchase post karte hain tab serial number darj hote hain.
serials.scrapConfirmDesc: Ikai stock se hata di jayegi aur wapas nahi mil sakti.

transfers.title: Stock Transfer
transfers.filterStatusAria: Status ke hisaab se filter karein
transfers.emptyBody: Apne Godown ke beech maal le jaane ke liye stock transfer use karein.

wastage.title: Wastage Register
wastage.tip: Wastage nuksan, expire ya khoye maal ko darj karta hai. Har entry double-entry aapke khaaton mein post hoti hai taaki nuksan aapke hisaab mein dikhe.
wastage.filterStatusAria: Status ke hisaab se filter karein
wastage.emptyBody: Prakriya ke dauran nuksan, expire ya khoye maal ko darj karein. Sara wastage double-entry aapke khaaton mein post hota hai.

lots.title: Lot
lots.tip: Lot stock ka ek track kiya gaya batch hai (vaikalpik inward aur expiry date ke saath) jo traceability aur first-expiry-first-out picking ke liye use hota hai.
lots.filterGodownAria: Godown ke hisaab se filter karein
lots.emptyBody: Lot tracking enable items ke liye jab aap purchase bill post karte hain tab Lot apne aap banta hai. Aap Lot manually bhi bana sakte hain.

samples.title: Sample aur Consignment
samples.tip: Sample aur consignment grahak ko manzuri ke liye bheja gaya maal hai. Sweekrit maal tax invoice mein badal jata hai; baaki stock mein wapas aata hai.
samples.filterStatusAria: Status ke hisaab se filter karein
samples.emptyBody: Manzuri ke liye ya consignment par grahako ko bheje maal ko track karein. Sweekrit maal apne aap tax invoice mein badal jata hai.

labels.title: Label chhapein
labels.generateFailed: Label banane mein vifal. Item ke paas valid item code hai ye jaanchein aur dobara koshish karein.

bom.title: Bill of Materials
bom.tip: Bill of Materials (BOM) ek finished item ke ek batch ko banane ke liye zaruri components aur quantity dikhata hai. Yeh manufacturing voucher par material khapat aur costing ko chalata hai.

vouchers.tip: Manufacturing voucher ek production run record karta hai: yeh (BOM ke anusar) input material ki khapat karta hai aur finished item banata hai, aur cost ke antar ko variance ke roop mein post karta hai.

listCommon.tip: Job-work matlab GST ke tahat processing ke liye principal ko maal bhejna (ya unse lena). Maal ka swamitva principal ke paas rehta hai; ITC-04 is movement ko record karta hai.

outward.title: Outward challan
outward.emptyTitle: Abhi tak koi outward challan nahi

outward.cancelConfirmTitle: Yeh draft challan cancel karna hai?

itc04.title: ITC-04 quarterly report
itc04.tip: ITC-04 ek quarterly GST return hai jo job-worker ko bheje aur unse mile maal ki jankari deta hai. Export kiye gaye JSON ka upyog karke GST portal par file karein.
itc04.exportTooltip: Chune gaye quarter ke liye GSTN-spec ITC-04 JSON file download karta hai. Portal filing ke liye apne CA ke saath share karein.
itc04.footerNote: hash aur signature field khali hain - upload par GSTN portal dwara calculate kiye jate hain
itc04.noData: {quarter} FY {fy} ke liye koi data uplabdh nahi
itc04.exportSuccess: {quarter} FY {fy} ke liye ITC-04 JSON download hua
itc04.exportFailed: ITC-04 JSON banane mein vifal. Sunishchit karein ki sabhi challan mein manya paksh GSTIN ho.

pending.title: Baki maal register
pending.tip: Baki maal mukhya paksh ka stock hai jo abhi bhi aapki custody mein hai. Ise track karein taki har lot GST samay-seema ke andar wapas ho (ya deemed supply maana jaye).
pending.kpiLotsExpiring: 30 din mein samapt hone wale lots
pending.emptyBody: Mukhya paksh ka saara maal wapas ho chuka hai. Nayi job-work custody track karne ke liye inward challan post karein.

master.title: Items
master.hsnSacTip: HSN (maal ke liye) ya SAC (services ke liye) GST classification code hai jo lagu tax rate tay karta hai. Apni rate notification se 4-8 ank ka code daalo.
master.trackBatchTip: Is item ko batch ya lot ke hisaab se (inward/expiry date ke saath) track karne ke liye on karo. Jo items aap wapas mangao ya pehle-expiry-pehle-out pick karo unke liye use karo.

hub.title: GST Compliance
hub.info: GST returns taiyar, verify aur file karne ki ek hi jagah: GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, ITC-04, e-Invoice, e-Way Bill aur filing se pehle ke data checks.

gstr1.title: GSTR-1
gstr1.info: GSTR-1 aapke outward supplies (sales) ka monthly ya quarterly return hai. Data verify karein, phir portal par upload karne ke liye GSTN JSON export karein.

gstr3b.title: GSTR-3B
gstr3b.info: GSTR-3B monthly summary return hai jahan aap net tax liability declare karte hain aur input tax credit claim karte hain. Export se pehle cells manually override ki ja sakti hain.
gstr3b.loadError: GSTR-3B data load nahi ho saka. Apna connection check karein aur dobara try karein.

einvoice.info: e-Invoice government ke Invoice Registration Portal (IRP) ke saath register ki gayi sale invoice hai, jo ek unique IRN aur signed QR code wapas deta hai.

ewaybill.title: e-Way Bill

verify.title: Mera data verify karein

trialBalance.title: Trial Balance
trialBalance.info: Har ledger account ko uske closing debit ya credit balance ke sath list karta hai. Total debit total credit ke barabar hone chahiye, jo verify karta hai ki books balance mein hain.

payments.title: Payment Receipts
payments.info: Payment receipt party se mile paise aur woh unke baki invoice ke against kaise lagu hue, yeh record karti hai.
payments.emptyText: Abhi tak koi payment receipt nahi. Shuru karne ke liye "New Receipt" par click karein.
payments.emptyTitle: Abhi tak koi payment receipt nahi
payments.emptyBody: Party se mile paise record karne ke liye apni pehli receipt banayein.

bankAccounts.title: Bank Accounts
bankAccounts.info: Bank accounts tumhari firm ke balance rakhte hai ane bank reconciliation ko feed karte hai. Nayi receipt ane payment ke liye ek ko default mark karo.
bankAccounts.empty: Abhi koi bank account nahi. Shuru karne ke liye ek banao.
bankAccounts.setDefaultTooltip: Default ke roop me set karo
bankAccounts.defaultUpdateFailed: Default account update karne me asafal
bankAccounts.setDefaultDone: Default account ke roop me set kiya
bankAccounts.saveFailed: Bank account save karne me asafal
bankAccounts.deleteConfirmTitleGeneric: Yeh bank account delete karna hai?
bankAccounts.deleteConfirmBody: Yeh account soft-delete karega. Zero na ho aisi balance wala account aap delete nahi kar sakte.
bankAccounts.deleteConfirmBodyDetail: Yeh action wapas nahi ho sakta. Zero na ho aisi balance wale accounts delete nahi ho sakte.

reconcile.title: Bank reconciliation
reconcile.info: Bank reconciliation tumhare import kiye bank statement ko ledger entries se match karta hai taaki har line ka hisaab ho.
reconcile.loadFailed: Reconciliation hub load karne me asafal.
reconcile.loadSessionFailed: Reconciliation session load karne me asafal.
reconcile.noFirm: Koi firm nahi mili. Kripya pehle firm set karo.
reconcile.mobileWarning: Bank reconciliation desktop ke liye optimise hai. Kripya badi screen use karo.
reconcile.emptyBody: Reconcile shuru karne ke liye apna pehla bank statement upload karo. HDFC, ICICI, SBI, Axis, Kotak ane 4 aur banks support karta hai.

cashRegisters.title: Cash registers
cashRegisters.info: Cash registers haath ki rokad track karte hai. Ginti ane reconcile ke liye day-end tally use karo, ane petty cash ko uski imprest rakam tak bharo.
cashRegisters.noFirm: Kripya pehle Finance > Dashboard se firm set karo.
cashRegisters.empty: Koi cash register nahi mila. Finance firm setup se ek banao.

cheques.title: Cheque register
cheques.info: Cheque register jari kiye ane mile cheques track karta hai, jisme post-dated cheques (PDC) ane unki maturity dates shamil hai.

contras.info: Contra entry tumhare apne cash ane bank accounts ke beech paisa move karti hai (udaharan, bank me rokad jama). Yeh kisi party ko asar nahi karti.
contras.noFirm: Kripya pehle Finance > Dashboard se firm banao.

journalVouchers.title: Journal vouchers
journalVouchers.info: Journal voucher santulit debit ane credit ke saath sidha ledger accounts ke samne accounting entry record karta hai, aise adjustment ke liye jo sale, purchase ya payment nahi hai.
journalVouchers.noFirm: Kripya pehle Finance > Dashboard se firm set karo.

loans.title: Loan
loans.info: Loans term loan, overdraft ane cash credit jaise udhaar track karta hai, EMI scheduling ane amortisation schedule ke saath.
loans.noFirm: Koi firm nahi mili. Pehle Finance me firm set karo.
loans.emiSkipped: Is mahine ke liye EMI pehle hi post ho gayi hai.
loans.closeConfirmBody: Is loan ko poora chukaya gaya mark karo. Yeh action wapas nahi ho sakta.
loans.historyHint: EMI history Schedule tab me dikhta hai - post hui entries dekhne ke liye Status = Paid se filter karo.

list.filterSegment: RFM segment ke hisaab se filter karo
list.filterGstin: GSTIN risk level ke hisaab se filter karo

drawer.printLanguageLabel: Is party ke liye default print bhasha
drawer.printLanguageTooltip: Invoice print karte samay use hota hai. Workspace default par wapas jaata hai.

index.title: Reminder engine
index.subtitle: in-app, email, SMS, push ane WhatsApp channels se payment follow-up automatic karo.
index.settingsDesc: Reminder channels, dispatch time ane global opt-out settings set karo.
index.rulesDesc: Invoice due date ya overdue event par trigger hone wale reminder rules banao ane manage karo.
index.logsDesc: Bheje gaye sabhi reminders ka audit trail dekho - bheja, asafal ya chhoda.
index.templatesDesc: Default templates automatic load hote hai. Template customisation future release me aayega.

logs.title: Reminder logs
logs.subtitle: Sabhi reminder dispatch prayaso ka audit trail. Recipients API dwara pehle se mask kiye hai.
logs.filterChannel: Channel ke hisaab se filter karo
logs.filterStatus: Status ke hisaab se filter karo
logs.loadFailed: Reminder logs load karne me asafal
logs.empty: Chuni hui filters ke liye koi reminder logs nahi mile.

rules.title: Reminder rules
rules.subtitle: Rules tay karte hai ki parties ko kab ane kaise reminder bhejna.
rules.loadFailed: Reminder rules load karne me asafal
rules.deleteDescription: Yeh wapas nahi ho sakta. Is rule ko use karte koi bhi queue me pade reminders chhod diye jaayenge.
rules.empty: Abhi koi reminder rule nahi. Ek jodne ke liye "Create Rule" par click karo.

ruleNew.title: Reminder Rule Banao
ruleNew.subtitle: Tay karo ki parties ko kab ane kaise reminder bhejna.

ruleEdit.title: Rule Edit Karo: {name}
ruleEdit.subtitle: Rule configuration update karo. Badlav agle dispatch run me lagu hote hai.

ruleForm.daysOffsetExtra: Negative = due se pehle (e.g. -3 matlab due date se 3 din pehle). Positive = due ke baad (e.g. +7 matlab 7 din overdue).
ruleForm.cooldownExtra: Is rule ke liye ek hi party ko bhejne ke beech kam se kam ghante.
ruleForm.partyExtra: Specific party chuno ya sabhi parties par lagu karne ke liye 'Global' rakho.
ruleForm.priorityExtra: Jab ek hi party ane trigger par kai rules match ho to zyada priority wale rules pehle check hote hai.

escalation.level3: Level 3 - Final Notice (automatic Call Todo banata hai)

settings.title: Reminder settings
settings.subtitle: Is firm ke liye global reminder behaviour set karo. Per-rule override default se zyada priority lete hai.
settings.loadFailed: Reminder settings load karne me asafal
settings.saveFailed: Reminder settings save karne me asafal
settings.dispatchNote: Note: Vaastvik dispatch cron rojana 07:30 IST par chalta hai. Yeh setting record hota hai par abhi dispatch schedule nahi badalta.
settings.minimumOutstandingExtra: Sirf un parties ko reminder karo jinki baki is threshold se upar ho.
settings.maxRemindersExtra: Safety limit - galti se spam run rokta hai.
settings.smsWarningBody: TRAI ke saath DLT registration zaruri hai (Principal Entity + sender header + template approval). Registration poora hone ke baad hi chalu karo. Unregistered sends Bhartiya telecom operators dwara block honge.
settings.pushWarningBody: Mobile app dwara user devices par FCM token registration zaruri hai. Registered token bina ke users ke liye push notification chupchaap fail honge. Users ko apna device register karne ke liye mobile app me login karne ko kaho.
settings.whatsAppWarningBody: AiSensy account, Meta-approved WhatsApp message template ane sakriya Live campaign zaruri hai. Template approval poora na ho tab tak sends fail honge. Approval prakriya shuru karne ke liye AiSensy support se sampark karo.
settings.creditsTitle: SMS / WhatsApp bhejne ke liye credits zaruri
settings.creditsTopUp: Reminder chalu rakhne ke liye top-up karo.

business.pageDescription: {firm} ke liye legal identity, address aur accounting preferences. Ye aapke invoices par dikhte hain aur tax chalate hain.
business.loadErrorTitle: Business profile load nahi ho saki
business.loadErrorSubtitle: Kripya page refresh karein ya thodi der baad dobara koshish karein.
business.identityHint: Aapka registered naam aur tax identifiers. Auto-fill ke liye GSTIN se laayein.
business.addressHint: Invoices par chhapta hai. Rajya CGST+SGST banam IGST chalata hai. Atirikt rajya registrations Tax / GSTINs ke neeche manage karein.
business.accountingHint: Aapke books, invoices aur stock ke liye default.
business.fyStartMonth: Financial year shuru hone ka mahina
business.fyStartMonthTooltip: Adhikatar bhartiya business apna financial year April (mahina 4) mein shuru karte hain.
business.booksBeginTooltip: manekhr mein aapke accounting record shuru hone ki tarikh.
business.booksBeginPlaceholder: Aapke books kab shuru hote hain?
business.aatoTooltip: Rs 5 crore (500 lakh) se upar e-invoicing anivarya ho jata hai.
business.roundingPolicyTooltip: Rupaye mein round karein poore-rupaye ke invoice total dikhata hai (bhartiya invoices par aam).
business.inventoryValuationTooltip: Beche gaye maal ki cost ke liye stock ka mulya kaise calculate hota hai.
business.qrmpTooltip: Trimasik return, masik bhugtan - aapke GSTR-3B filing samay ko prabhavit karta hai.
business.allowNegativeStockTooltip: Hath ka stock zero se neeche jaye tab bhi items issue karne dein.
business.controlsHint: Maker-checker invoice antim hone se pahle ek review step jodta hai.
business.requireApproval: Sale invoices ke liye approval jaruri
business.requireApprovalTooltip: Chalu hone par, invoice post karne se vo approval ke liye bheja jata hai. Vo antim hone se pahle alag user ko approve karna padta hai (bhejne wala apna approve nahi kar sakta).
business.booksLockHint: Is tarikh ko ya is se pahle ki koi bhi posting ya edit block karein (jaise us mahine ka GST return file karne ke baad). Dobara kholne ke liye ise saaf karein.
business.noAccessSubtitle: Business profile edit karne ki aapko anumati nahi hai. Apne workspace malik se puchein.

accounts.archiveConfirm: Yeh ledger archive karna hai? Yeh history me rehta hai par list se chhup jaata hai.

accounts.empty: Tumhari search se koi account match nahi karta.
accounts.codeLockedHint: Ledger banne ke baad code fixed rehta hai.

supply.interBody: Buyer {buyerState} mein hai, aap {sellerState} se bill karte hain. IGST lagta hai (single combined rate).

brokerReviews.proofLine: Dono taraf se confirm ki gayi {count, plural, one {# pehchaan} other {# pehchaane}} · {reviews, plural, one {# review} other {# reviews}}

brokerReviews.signInToRead: Reviews padhne ke liye sign in karein.

whyPrivate.title: Yeh private kyun hai?
whyPrivate.body: Review dene wale apne business rishton ko bachane ke liye apna naam chhupate hain. Har review ke peeche ki pehchaan ko dono taraf ne confirm kiya hota hai, isliye naam na dikhne par bhi har review verified hota hai.

form.commentPlaceholder: Introduction kaisa raha bataiye. Kya accha raha?
form.privacyNote: Default roop se private. Jab tak aap khud na chahein, aapka naam kabhi nahi dikhaya jaata.
form.visibilityHelp: Naam ke bina wale review mein sirf aapke initials, aapki role (khareedne wala ya bechne wala) aur aapka shaher dikhta hai. Aapka naam chhupa rehta hai.

form.withdrawConfirm: Is review ko wapas lein? Ise wapas nahi kiya ja sakta.
form.withdrawSuccess: Aapka review wapas le liya gaya.

hireCandidates.button: Hamare trained candidates ko hire karein
hireCandidates.intro: {name} ko bataiye ki aapko kaise trained log chahiye. Unhe aapka message unke inbox mein milega aur ve candidates ke saath reply kar sakte hain. Hiring ka kaam hum nahi karte.
hireCandidates.placeholder: Misaal: Hame Surat mein full-time kaam ke liye 3 power-loom operator chahiye.

hireCandidates.selfError: Yeh aapka khud ka institute page hai, isliye aap khud ko hiring request nahi bhej sakte.
hireCandidates.genericError: Aapka message bheja nahi ja saka. Kripya phir se try karein.

companyPageAdmin.startSellingTitle: Is company ke liye shop kholo
companyPageAdmin.startSellingHint: Humne aapki company details se shop pehle se bhar di hai. Jo chahe badlo, phir banao. Shop is page se linked rahegi.
companyPageAdmin.startSellingSuccess: Shop ban gayi aur is page se link ho gayi.
companyPageAdmin.postAsPage: Page ke roop mein post karein
companyPageAdmin.postPublished: Aapke page par post ho gaya.
companyPageAdmin.erpLinkedHint: Yeh page ek live ERP workspace se juda hai.

rail.body: ManekHR Connect par aapki business pehchaan. Khareedaar ko batao ki aap kya banate hain aur aapki capacity. Bechne ke liye taiyaar ho to page se shop kholo.

companyPageAdmin.hubSubtitle: ManekHR Connect par aapki business pehchaan. Aap ek se zyada rakh sakte hain.
companyPageAdmin.emptyBody: Buyers ko dikhane ke liye company page banayein ki aap kaun hain, kya banate hain aur aapki capacity kya hai.
companyPageAdmin.deleteConfirmBody: Yeh page aur iska public address hat jayega. Ise wapas nahi laya ja sakta.
companyPageAdmin.deleteConfirmPrompt: Confirm karne ke liye, niche <name></name> type karein.
companyPageAdmin.nameRequired: Kripya business ka naam darj karein
companyPageAdmin.aboutPlaceholder: Buyers ko apne business, apni kahani aur aap kis cheez ke liye jaane jaate hain bataayein.
companyPageAdmin.specializationPlaceholder: Type karke enter dabayein, jaise zari embroidery
companyPageAdmin.visibilityLabel: Yeh page kaun dekh sakta hai
companyPageAdmin.deleteConfirm: Yeh company page delete karein? Yeh wapas nahi aayega.
companyPageAdmin.createSubtitle: Ek public page taaki buyers, workers aur recruiters aapke business ko dhoondh sakein, follow kar sakein aur poochhtaachh bhej sakein.

companyPageAdmin.saveDraft: Draft ke roop mein save karein
companyPageAdmin.draftSaved: Draft ke roop mein save ho gaya. Jab tak aap public na karein tab tak sirf aap hi ise dekh sakte hain.

companyPageAdmin.sectionAboutHint: Bataayein ki aapka business kya karta hai aur aap kis cheez ke liye jaane jaate hain.
companyPageAdmin.sectionCapabilitiesHint: Machine aur production ki details jo buyers ko aapke unit ka andaaza lagaane mein madad karti hain.
companyPageAdmin.sectionLocationHint: Aap kahan hain. Buyers aur workers area ke hisaab se pages filter karte hain.
companyPageAdmin.sectionVisibilityHint: Chunein ki yeh page kaun dekh sakta hai.
companyPageAdmin.logoHint: Choras image, kam se kam 300x300px. JPG ya PNG.
companyPageAdmin.bannerHint: Aapke workshop floor ya taiyaar kaam ki chaudi image.
companyPageAdmin.specializationHint: Aap kya karte hain iski chhoti line, jo page ke naam ke theek neeche dikhti hai.
companyPageAdmin.languagesHint: Jin bhashaon mein aap call aur WhatsApp par order sambhaal sakte hain.

companyPageAdmin.erpUnlinkedNoteBody: Pehle se ManekHR ERP par chal rahe hain? Judne se buyers jis par bharosa karte hain woh ERP badge milta hai. Page banaane ke baad aap yeh kabhi bhi kar sakte hain.
companyPageAdmin.previewLive: Aap type karte hi update hota hai
companyPageAdmin.previewHelp: Aapka page buyers ko aise dikhega. Ise update hote dekhne ke liye form bharein.
companyPageAdmin.unpublishSuccess: Page unpublish ho gaya. Yeh ab buyers se chhupa hai.
companyPageAdmin.setupBody: Pura page bharosa kamaata hai. Buyers pure dikhne wale pages ko follow aur message karte hain. Inhe pura karein aur dashboard sambhaal lega.

companyPageAdmin.aboutEmpty: Aapka About section khaali hai. Buyers aise pages follow karte hain jo bataate hain ki aap kya vyapaar karte hain.

companyPageAdmin.peopleBody: Jo team members is workspace ko list karte hain woh apni sehmati se aapke public page par dikhte hain. Woh aapki team se manage hote hain, yahan se nahi.

companyPageAdmin.shareQrAlt: Aapke company page se jodne wala QR code

mgr.lede: Apni listings aur jobs ko sahi logo tak promote karein. Har boost ne kitne logo tak pahuncha aur kitna kharch hua yeh track karein, phir jo kaam karta hai us par zyada dhyan dein.

empty.draftsBody: Aapke shuru kiye par launch na kiye gaye boost, aur jo manjoor nahi hue, yahan intzaar karenge.

cfg.title: Ise boost karein
cfg.lede: Ise zyada sahi logo ke saamne laayein. Kise dikhna chahiye chunein, daily budget set karein, aur hum ise khatm hone tak feed, search aur marketplace mein promote karenge.

summary.gatedNotice: Boost yahan purchase ke liye uplabdh nahi hai, isliye koi charge nahi liya jayega.

spotlight.help: Log jo padh rahe hain uske bagal mein, prime side panel mein bhi dikhayein. Premium rate: top spot ke liye prati view zyada rate.

toast.launched: Boost launch hua. Yeh ab chal raha hai.

howItWorks.title: Boosting kaise kaam karti hai
howItWorks.step1Title: Promote karne ke liye kuch chunein
howItWorks.step1Body: Apni koi product ya job chunein jo pehle se hai.
howItWorks.step2Body: Kitna kharch karna aur kise dikhana hai, ye tay karein.
howItWorks.step3Body: Views aur clicks dekhein, aur kabhi bhi badlein.
howItWorks.reassure: Sirf jo chalega uske liye paisa lagega, aur aapke budget se zyada kabhi nahi.

quickStart.title: Kuch boost karein
quickStart.subtitle: Apni koi cheez promote karein jo pehle se hai. Set karne ke liye tap karein.

quickStart.promoteWorkBody: Hiring karne wale employers ke saamne apni profile promote karein.
quickStart.promoteHiringBody: Zyada workers tak pahunchne ke liye aap hiring kar rahe hain yeh promote karein.
quickStart.hiringNudgeTitle: Aap hiring ke liye khule hain
quickStart.hiringNudgeBody: Job post karein, phir zyada workers tak pahunchne ke liye use boost karein.
quickStart.dealsNudgeTitle: Aap deals ke liye khule hain
quickStart.dealsNudgeBody: Apni shop me product add karein, phir zyada buyers tak pahunchne ke liye use boost karein.
quickStart.nothingTitle: Boost karne ke liye abhi kuch nahi
quickStart.nothingBody: Pehle product add karein ya job post karein, phir use boost karne ke liye wapas aayein.

rateRow.title: Rates
rateRow.help: Aap kaam ke kitne paise lete hain. Daily wage har din ke kaam ka milta hai. Piece rate har taiyar piece ka milta hai, jaise ek saree. Monthly ek fixed salary hai. Jo aap dete hain woh set karein. Kharidaar aur workshop ise dekh sakte hain.

contactPref.help: Kharidaar aur workshop aap se pehle kaise sampark karein, woh chunein. WhatsApp WhatsApp par chat kholta hai. Call aapke phone par ring karta hai. DM ManekHR Connect ke andar ka message hai.

profileStrength.title: Profile strength
profileStrength.help: Poori profile zyada dikhti hai. Kharidaar aur workshop poori profile par pehle bharosa karte hain. Niche har item poora karein aur apna score 100% tak badhayein.

openTo.exclusiveHint: Aap ya to kaam ke liye taiyaar ho sakte hain, ya log rakhne ke liye - ek saath dono nahi. Ek chalu karne par doosra band ho jaayega.

edit.districtHint: Aapka textile hub. Aapke paas ki post dikhane ke liye aur taaki vyapaar aapko area se dhoondh sake, iske liye use hota hai.
edit.districtMax: District ko 80 akshar se kam rakhein.
edit.avatarHint: Aapke chehre ka saaf photo. Square sabse achha kaam karta hai. Connect par aapke naam ke saath dikhega.
edit.bannerHint: Aapki profile ke upar dikhne wali chaudi photo. Apni workshop, apni machine, ya apna kaam dikhayein.
edit.headline: Headline
edit.headlineHelp: Ek chhoti line jo batati hai ki aap kya karte hain. Jaise "Zari karigar, 12 saal, multi-head machine". Log sabse pehle yahi padhte hain.
edit.headlinePlaceholder: jaise Zari karigar · 12 saal · Multi-head machine
edit.bioPlaceholder: Apne kaam, anubhav aur aap kisme sabse acche hain uske bare mein likhein.
edit.skillsHelp: Aap jis prakaar ka kaam kar sakte hain, jaise zari, sequins ya aari. List se chunein ya khud likhein. Kharidaar aur workshop kaushal se dhoondhte hain.
edit.workshopMax: Workshop ka naam 160 akshar se kam rakhein.
edit.companyLinkHint: Apni company chuniye taki uska logo dikhe, ya sirf naam type kariye
edit.toHint: Agar aap abhi bhi yahan kaam karte hain to khali chhodein.
edit.currentlyHere: Main abhi yahan kaam karta hoon
edit.descriptionPlaceholder: Wahan ke apne kaam ka chhota varnan karein.

edit.visibilityHelp: "Koi bhi dekh sakta hai" aapki profile ko ek public web page par dalta hai jise kharidaar dhoondh sakte hain. "Sirf mere connection" use aapse jude logon ko dikhata hai. "Chhupa hua" matlab aapke alawa koi nahi dekh sakta.
edit.invalid: Kripya form jaanchein aur dobara try karein.
edit.uploadFailed: Aapki profile save nahi ho saki. Kripya dobara try karein.

following.helpTitle: Follow karne ka matlab kya hai?
following.help: Jab aap kisi ko follow karte hain, tab aap unke raazi hue bina unke update dekhte hain. Unhe pata nahi chalta. Jinka kaam aapko pasand hai un par nazar rakhne ka yeh ek-tarfa tareeka hai.
following.unfollowError: Follow band nahi ho saka. Dobara koshish karein.

empty.title: Aap abhi kisi ko follow nahi karte
empty.body: Jinke kaam ke saath aap update rehna chahte hain aise log aur workshop ko follow karein. Follow karna ek-tarfa hai aur unki manzoori zaroori nahi.

empty.title: Abhi koi follower nahi
empty.body: Jo log aapko follow karte hain wo yahan dikhenge. Useful kaam post karein aur trade ke logon se connect karein taaki aapke followers badhein.

suggestions.railEmpty: Abhi koi suggestion nahi. Network badhne par dobara dekhein.
suggestions.help: Ye woh log hain jinhe aap shayad jaante hain. Aap kiske saath kaam karte hain, aap dono kise jaante hain, aur aapke beech kaun si skills saajhi hain, uske aadhar par chune gaye. Hum kabhi jaati ya dharm ka istemaal nahi karte.

overLimit.hideBodyGrace: Aapke paas {limit} me se {used} {kind} hain. {date} ke baad, jab tak aap limit me wapas nahi aate tab tak sabse nayi {excess} public se chhupa di jayengi. Kuch bhi delete nahi hota.
overLimit.hideBodyActive: Aap limit se zyada hone ki wajah se aapki {count} {kind} public se chhupi hui hain. Wo aapke account me rehti hain aur kuch bhi delete nahi hota. Wapas laane ke liye kuch hatayein ya upgrade karein.
overLimit.suppressedTooltip: Yeh cheez aapki plan limit se zyada hai, isliye public se chhupi hui hai. Yeh aapke account me rehti hai aur kuch bhi delete nahi hota. Ise wapas laane ke liye doosri cheezein hatayein ya upgrade karein.

inquiry.intro: Ek chhota sandesh bhejein aur vikreta aapse sampark karega. Price aur delivery aap seedhe unke saath tay karein. ManekHR payment nahi sambhalta.

errors.selfInquiry: Yeh aapki apni listing hai, isliye aap khud ko inquiry nahi bhej sakte.
errors.sellerCap: Is vikreta ne is mahine jitni inquiry le sakte hain utni le li hain. Agle mahine dobara koshish karein, ya doosri listing dekhein.
errors.listingGone: Yeh listing ab uplabdh nahi hai.
errors.rateLimited: Aap bahut tezi se inquiry bhej rahe hain. Kripya ek minute rukein aur dobara koshish karein.
errors.generic: Hum aapki inquiry nahi bhej paaye. Kripya dobara koshish karein.

inquiry.enrolIntro: Sanstha ko apni detail aur sawaal bhejein. Wo seats, batch ki tarikh aur fee confirm karne ke liye jawab denge. ManekHR payment ya enrolment nahi sambhalta.

new.title: Product add karein
new.subtitle: Dhandhe ke kharidaar dhoondh sakein iske liye product ya seva add karein. Aap list karte hi yeh turant live ho jayega.
new.requiredNote: Publish karne ke liye zaroori: Title aur Category
new.duplicateCta: Ya kisi maujooda product ki copy banayein
new.duplicateHelp: Nayi listing mein details copy karne ke liye product chunein. Photos copy nahi hote.
new.draftRestored: Humne aapka bina save kiya draft wapas laaya.
new.draftSavedAgo: Draft {minutes, plural, one {# minute} other {# minute}} pehle save hua
new.flashPublished: Product publish ho gaya. Agla add karein.

section.photosHelp: Saaf, achhi roshni waali photos add karein. Pehli photo cover hoti hai jo buyers dekhte hain. Teen ya zyada photos waali listings ko zyada inquiries milti hain. JPG ya PNG, har ek 5MB tak.
section.videoHelp: Apne product ko chalte hue dikhane ke liye ek chhota video add karein ({seconds} second tak). Optional. MP4 ya WebM.
section.detailsHelp: Kharidaaron ko samajhne mein madad karein. Material, quality aur koi bhi sharten batayein.
section.pricingHelp: Sab optional. Jo kharidaar ko decide karne mein madad kare wo add karein.
section.locationHelp: Aas-paas ke kharidaaron ko aapko dhoondhne mein madad karta hai.
section.specsHelp: Optional. Kharidaar ko table jaisa dikhta hai - kapda, kaam, rang, vajan, jo decide karne mein madad kare.
section.tradeTermsHelp: Aap kaise dispatch karte hain, payment lete hain aur return sambhalte hain. Product page par dikhega.

collections.noProductsToAdd: Pehle shop me products add karo, phir yaha group karo.
collections.deleteBody: Collection hat jayegi. Products rahenge; sirf grouping jayegi.
collections.descriptionPlaceholder: Collection ke upar dikhne wali ek choti line.

meta.title: Refer karein aur kamayein
meta.description: Doston ko ManekHR Connect par bulayein aur muft boost credits kamayein.

hero.title: Refer karein aur kamayein
hero.earnLine: Aapka dost jab join karta hai to use {referee} muft boost credits milte hain, aur aap {referrer} kamate hain.
hero.copyFailed: Copy nahi hua. Kripaya haath se copy karein.
hero.shareText: ManekHR Connect par mere saath judein aur {referee} muft boost credits payein: {link}
hero.whatsappAriaLabel: WhatsApp par apna referral link share karein
hero.nativeShareTitle: ManekHR Connect par mere saath judein

stats.earnedSub: boosts par kharch karne ke liye taiyar
stats.pendingSub: ruke hue hain, thodi samiksha ke baad milenge

list.title: Aapne refer kiye log
list.subtitle: Aapke 20 sabse recent
list.empty: Abhi tak koi referral nahi. Kamana shuru karne ke liye apna link share karein.

step1.title: Apna link share karein
step1.body: Doston ko apna referral link bhejein.

step2.title: Aapka dost jude aur active ho
step2.body: Woh aapke link se sign up kare aur Connect use karna shuru kare.

step3.title: Aap dono boost credits kamayein
step3.body: Thodi samiksha ke baad credits aapke wallet mein aa jaate hain.

terms.note: Credits muft in-app credits hain jinhe aap sirf post boost karne ke liye use kar sakte hain. Ye cash nahi hain aur inhe withdraw ya transfer nahi kiya ja sakta. Yeh program kabhi bhi badla ya band kiya ja sakta hai.

disabled.title: Referrals jald aane wale hain
disabled.body: Yeh program abhi active nahi hai. Thodi der mein dobara dekhein.

error.title: Aapke referrals load nahi ho sake
error.body: Kuch galat ho gaya. Phir se koshish karein.

boostNudge.title: Muft boost credits kamayein
boostNudge.body: Ek dost ko refer karein aur aap dono boost credits payein.

signup.label: Referral code (vaikalpik)
signup.hint: Dost ka code hai? Bonus boost credits ke liye add karein.

meta.title: Introductions
meta.description: Aapke liye kiye gaye introductions confirm karein, aur aapne kiye introductions dekhein.

introductions.pageSubtitle: Ek dalal do logon ka parichay karva sakta hai. Live hone se pehle dono taraf confirm karte hain.

privacy.title: Aapki privacy surakshit hai
privacy.body: Parichay confirm karne se sirf yeh verify hota hai ki woh sach me hua tha. Hum kabhi aapka phone number ya contact details share nahi karte. Agar aap baad me dalal ka review dete hain, to aapka naam default roop se private rehta hai, sirf aapke initials, role aur shaher dikhaye jaate hain.

introductions.brokerOnlyHint: Do logon ka parichay karvane ke liye apni profile par broker vikalp chalu karein.
introductions.toConfirmEmpty: Aapki confirmation ke liye koi introduction intezaar mein nahi hai.
introductions.mineEmpty: Aapne abhi tak koi introduction nahi karaya hai.
introductions.receivedEmpty: Abhi tak koi confirm hua introduction nahi hai. Aapke liye karaya gaya introduction jab dono taraf se confirm ho jaaye, tab aap yahan dalal ka review de sakte hain.
introductions.composerSubtitle: Apne do connections chunein, kaun khareedar hai aur kaun bechne wala hai bataayein, aur bhejein. Dono ko confirm karna hoga.
introductions.roleRequired: Kripya bataayein ki khareedar kaun hai.
introductions.notePlaceholder: Dono logon ke liye ek chhoti note jodein.
introductions.createSuccess: Introduction bhej diya. Dono logon se confirm karne ko kaha jayega.

banners.title: Feed banner
banners.subtitle: Connect feed carousel me dikhne wale promotional banners.
banners.deleteConfirm: Kya is banner ko delete karna hai?
banners.reorderHint: Kram badalne ke liye rows drag karein.
banners.empty: Abhi koi banner nahi hai. Feed me dikhane ke liye ek add karein.

form.title: Title
form.altHint: Screen reader ke liye image ka vivran.

regularizationSettings.title: Regularization settings
regularizationSettings.subtitle: Apne workspace ke liye hajiri correction requests kaise kaam karti hain woh configure karein.

form.maxAttachments: Har request ke liye maximum file attachments

tooltips.approvalLevels: Correction request lagu hone se pehle kitne manager ko manjuri deni zaruri hai. 1 matlab sirf seedha manager manjuri deta hai. 2 ya 3 reporting chain me upar ke additional level add karte hain.
tooltips.maxDaysBack: Karmchari pichhle itne dino ke andar ki hajiri ke liye hi correction request kar sakte hain. Udaharan ke liye, 30 matlab ve sirf pichhle 30 din ki hajiri sudhar sakte hain.
tooltips.fallbackApprover: Jab karmchari ka reporting manager set na ho ya approval chain resolve na ho paaye, tab yeh vyakti approver ke roop me aage aata hai. Salah: ise HR admin par set karein.
tooltips.maxAttachments: Karmchari correction request ke sath kitni supporting files (photo, document) attach kar sakte hain. Request ke liye file upload band karne ke liye 0 par set karein.

alerts.saved: Regularization settings safaltapoorvak save ho gayi.

salarySettings.ownerOnlyWarning: Sirf workspace owner yeh settings badal sakte hain.

disbursement.helperText: Monthly salary kab paid record ki ja sakti hai (jaise January ki pay 1 se 6 February ke beech). Ye un staff par lagu hai jinhe aap salary access dete hain; owner kabhi bhi payment record kar sakte hain.
disbursement.salaryDateHint: Agle mahine ki wo tarikh jis din pagar diya ja sakta hai (1-28).
disbursement.payoutWindowHint: Pagar tarikh ke baad kitne din tak payment allowed hai.
disbursement.advanceRequestDayHint: Is mahine ka aakhri din jis din karmachari advance pagar ki request kar sakte hain.
disbursement.advancePayoutDayHint: Mahine ka wo din jis din approved advance diya jaata hai (1-28). Koi fixed din na ho to khaali chhodein.
disbursement.advancesGroupHint: Employees kab advance request kar sakte hain, kab pay hota hai, aur optional limits.
disbursement.advanceRequestWindowHint: Har mahine karmachari kab advance pagar ki request kar sakte hain wo chunein.
disbursement.eligibilityCapsHint: Karmachari advance ki request kare to check hone wale vaikalpik niyantran. Us seema ko band karne ke liye field khaali chhodein.
disbursement.maxPercentOfNetHint: Ek advance karmachari ke maasik pagar ke is percent se zyada nahi ho sakta.
disbursement.maxPerYearHint: Ek calendar saal mein karmachari zyada se zyada kitni advance request kar sakte hain.
disbursement.minTenureHint: Karmachari request kar sake usse pehle (join date se) kitne mahine kaam kiya hona chahiye.

salaryLoss.regularizationWindowHint: Mahine ke ant ke baad kitne din tak hajri regularize ki ja sakti hai, uske baad pagar-nuksan darj hoga (default 45).
salaryLoss.enabledHint: Saksham hone par, avaitanik-chhuti din regularization window band hone ke baad COA khate mein debit entry darz karte hain.

attendanceRules.holidayHint: Saksham hone par, ghoshit chhutiyaan pagar ganana mein hajar din maani jaati hain.
attendanceRules.weekOffHint: Saksham hone par, saptahik band din pagar ganana mein hajar maane jaate hain.
attendanceRules.lateMarkLabel: Late mark aadha din maana jaaye
attendanceRules.lateMarkHint: Saksham hone par, late mark wale karmachari ke maasik pagar se 0.5 din kaat liye jaate hain.

advanceDisburse.splitSumError: Split rakamon ka jod approved rakam ke barabar hona chahiye.
advanceDisburse.recoveryPlanHint: Yeh advance bhavishya ki pagar se kaise recover hota hai.
advanceDisburse.bulkPartialMessage: {total} me se {failed} disbursement fail hue. Baaki pay ho gaye.

advanceAllocation.progressApproving: {total} mein se {done} approve ho rahe hain...

advanceSalary.requestDrawerDescription: {month}/{year} ke liye advance request submit karein.
advanceSalary.recoveryNote: Advance isi mahine ki salary se kat jayega — baki raqam salary ke din milegi. Monthly installments chahiye? 0% loan ke liye apply karein.
advanceSalary.bulkApproveConfirm: {count} requests unki maangi hui raqam par approve karein?
advanceSalary.bulkApprovePartial: {total} me se {failed} approval fail hue. Baaki approve ho gaye.
advanceSalary.requestDayClosedTooltip: Advance requests sirf mahine ke {day}ve din sweekar ki jaati hain.
advanceSalary.requestDayClosedBanner: Advance requests sirf is mahine ke {day}ve din sweekar ki jaati hain.
advanceSalary.amountMustBePositive: Rakam shoonya se adhik honi chahiye.
advanceSalary.rejectSuccess: Advance request reject kar di gayi.
advanceSalary.approveStepHint: Recovery plan aur bhugtan vivran advance disburse karte samay set hote hain.
advanceSalary.noRequests: Koi bhi pending advance request nahi hai.
advanceSalary.approveModalDescription: Maangi: {requested}. Neeche approved rakam badal sakte hain.
advanceSalary.recoveryPlanHint: Set karein ki yeh advance aage ki pay se kaise recover hoga. Hamesha interest-free.
advanceSalary.overrideComplianceLabel: Deduction-cap warning ke bawajood approve karein
advanceSalary.overrideReasonPlaceholder: Safe monthly limit se upar approve kyun karein?
advanceSalary.overrideReasonRequired: Kripya override ke liye ek kaaran dein.
advanceSalary.approveBlockedByBreach: Yeh plan kam se kam ek month mein 50% pay-deduction cap todta hai. Monthly rakam kam karein, ise zyada months mein baatein, ya kaaran ke saath approve karein.
advanceSalary.pageSubtitle: Salary advance ke liye karmachari ki requests review aur approve karein.
